9a0043fd4258a1286db1e253ca591662b3aac849.text:
very kind owner who takes a personal interest in her guests. clean. comfortable beds.  free mineral water.
on the negative side, there are no fridges in rooms and tv reception was poor.   also there used to be a very good restaurant downstairs which is now under different management and is much less appealing.

reasons: used to be a very good restaurant downstairs

9a0043fd4258a1286db1e253ca591662b3aac849.text: ik verbleef hier 2 nachten vrijdag 30 november tot zondag 2 december en het is mij zeer goed bevallen. het is een heel gezellig klein hotelletje met heel vriendelijk personeel die er voor zorgt dat je er helemaal thuis voelt. ontbijt perfect, goed bed en alles schoon.
günstig gelegenes schönes |MASK|, trotz restaurant unten sehr ruhig. sauberes sehr gepflegtes zimmer, sehr freundliche zuvorkommende besitzerin. es fehlte uns an nichts. nur zu empfehlen!
gute anbindung an u-bahn,           freundliches personal

vriendelijke dame bij ontvangst, hondjes waren ook zeer welkom. mevrouw heeft zelf ook hondje . alles netjes wie wenst kan gezellig ontbijten helaas hadden wij daar geen tijd voor . wij komen zeker terug .

reasons: helaas hadden wij daar geen tijd voor

9a0043fd4258a1286db1e253ca591662b3aac849.text: super nettes personal,sehr gutes essen, aureichend parkplätze, sehr gute verkehrsanbindung mit övm
der empfang war unglücklich, weil an diesem tag ruhetag war.

das bestechendste war die freundlichkeit, offenheit und bemühtheit des personals! selten so erlebt! vielen dank für alles! 
auf wunsch wird sogar glutenfreies frühstück serviert! 
das w-lan ist sehr instabil.
etwas unangenehm waren die gerüche; von fettgeruch bis abgestandener zigarettenrauch. dies war nur bei tag und nacht geöffnetem fenster und raumdeo aushaltbar.

die unterkunft war sauber, gut und sehr freundliches personal. frühstück gab es schon ab 7°°uhr bis 11°°uhr.
es war reichhaltig, guter kaffee, frische bröchen usw.
die anbindung zur stadt ist super, nur 3haltestellen mit der u-bahn.
sehr gute lage - netter empfang - wir kommen gerne wieder
beim frühstück war es schon recht eklig, dass der hund die wurst vom tablett gezogen hat. insgesamt wirkt das hotel düster und staubig. für eine nacht kann man es dort aber aushalten.

reasons: der hund die wurst vom tablett gezogen hat

9a0043fd4258a1286db1e253ca591662b3aac849.text: dame à l'accueil très sympa.
sehr in die jahre gekommen. überall teppichboden. unangenehmer geruch durch die gaststätte im erdgeschoß. sehr liebevolle besitzerin.

reasons: unangenehmer geruch durch die gaststätte im erdgeschoß

9a0043fd4258a1286db1e253ca591662b3aac849.text: sehr freundliche und zuvorkommende wirtin. frühstück bekam ich auf wunsch eine halbe stunde früher. dafür brachte sie mir dann noch extra etwas vom bäcker mit. und der preis war mehr als fair. ich kann dieses |MASK| wärmstens empfehlen. grüße

9a0043fd4258a1286db1e253ca591662b3aac849.text: besitzerin sehr nett, frühstück super, zimmer einfach gehalten aber sauber, für einen zwischenstopp in bochum kann ich es empfehlen. daneben eine wunderbare weinbar.

freundliches personal, gute küche, alles sauber und alles vorhanden.
gerne wieder.
uschi und klaus aus wolfsburg

die zimmer sind bereits ein wenig "abgerockt". fernseher ohne privatfernsehen ( rtl, sat 1 o.ä. ), weil kein ci-modul verfügbar. betten und bettwäsche sind sauber. die bettwäsche selbst ist funktional allerdings nicht neuwertig. teilweise fehlen knöpfe oder teile sind abgerissen.  badezimmer sauber und ordentlich. allerdings sind die handtücher auch ein wenig in die jahre gekommen (an den seiten ausgefranst). positiv ist mir aufgefallen, dass wir ein fliegengitter vor dem fenster hatten. allerdings im bad und in dem anderen zimmer nicht. 
das frühstück ist sehr einfach gehalten: eine sorte wurst und eine sorte käse aus der packung. verschiedene süssaufstriche aus kleinen einwegpackungen. eierspeisen auf nachfrage. brötchen schienen frisch und nicht aufbackware. müsli auch verschiedene sorten vorhanden. mir fehlte frisches obst und gemüse sowie quark oder naturjoghurt. etwas schöner angerichtet wäre sicher auch möglich gewesen. es macht aber satt.
das personal ist wirklich sehr freundlich, zimmer wurden gut gemacht. für mich gewöhnungsbedürftig die lage am kreisel ( ziemlich laut ), die combo mit einem restaurant ( riecht halt im zimmer nach speisen, wenn unten gekocht wird; check-in ist dann auch etwas komisch ) und die wirklich hellhörigen zimmer( gruß an die kollegen mit ihrem "nachttrunk" um drei uhr in der frühe ).

reasons: eine sorte wurst und eine sorte käse aus der packung
frisches obst und gemüse sowie quark oder naturjoghurt fehlte
etwas schöner angerichtet wäre sicher auch möglich gewesen
riecht halt im zimmer nach speisen, wenn unten gekocht wird

9a0043fd4258a1286db1e253ca591662b3aac849.text:
an excellent experience. room simple but very clean. the host is very friendly, there are water and fruit on the house, available 24/7. excellent german style breakfast that will be prepared on demand.
the location is especially convenient, only 3-4 min walking from the underground station (3 stops from train station), in very quiet area.
recommend without reservation.

reasons: excellent german style breakfast that will be prepared on demand

9a0043fd4258a1286db1e253ca591662b3aac849.text: alles super gerne wieder, sehr nettes personal, klasse frühstück,
das personal war sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit.das frühstück war lecker und zu vollsten zufriedenheit. nachreichungen waren kein problem. würde immer wieder dort übernachten.
ein absolut empfehlenswertes kleines hotel mit der besten und nettesten besitzerin die es gibt. mann fühlt dich fast wie zuhause. sehr leckeres frühstück wir kommen wieder!

sehr nette inhaberin. zimmer sauber und ordentlich. leide etwas in die jahre gekommen. was uns am wenigsten gefallen hat, das es keine vernünftigen vorhänge oder jalousien zum abdunkeln gab. es war bereits morgends um 6.30 uhr taghell im zimmer und dadurch leider eine kurze nacht. auch die bettwäsche war für die sommertage viel zu dick. die matratzen sind auch schon sehr durchgelegen. alles in allem war es aber für zwei tage ok da wir die meiste zeit eh unterwegs waren.

zimmer mittelgroß, gut und sauber. tv mit usb-anschlußmöglichkeit. bad geräumig, alles gut angeordnet. sehr nettes und hilfsbereites personal. dusche hoch genug für große menschen und mit temperaturwahl (optimal). gratis parken für gäste. u-bahn-station in der nähe, zu fuß sind es 20 bis 30 minuten in die innenstadt.

wir sind mit einem kleinen hund angereist. das 1. zimmer im 2. og das wir zuerst zugeteilt bekamen war für mich sehr enttäuschend, sodass ich dachte einmal und nie wieder.
wie wurden dann , aufgrund einer anreise einer grossfamilie in ein anderes zimmer gebracht. ( zum glück) dieses zimmer war top.
die hotelinhaberin war sehr nett und entgegenkommend. hat sich immer wieder um die gäste gekümmert. schade fand ich, dass nur an bestimmten tagen mittagessen angeboten wurde. das sollte man beim check in erwähnen, 
das hatte man leider versäumt , sodass wir an dem einem mittag uns das essen selbst besorgen mussten, ansonsten war alles ok,

reasons: nur an bestimmten tagen mittagessen angeboten wurde
sollte man beim check in erwähnen
hatten uns das essen selbst besorgen müssen

an sich ein schönes, familiäres hotel, auch die gastfreundlichkeit sollte man an dieser stelle einmal hervorheben. allerdings kam es teilweise vor, dass ein rauchergeruch durch das hotel zog. der frühstücksraum wirkte etwas älter, das zimmer war aber schön.

the room was clean and standard. check in was a problem. we arrived around 3.30 p.m. there didn't seem to be antone about. i had to ask next door in the wine shop about checking in. after ringing the door bell and elderly lady looked out the window and dircetsd me in to the building. i eventually managed to locate appropriate person, who looked like she'd just awoken.  she showed me to our room and and we didn't see her until breakfast the next day.  we would have had a meal there but due to first impressions we decided to go elsewhere.
breakfast was adequate.

sehr nette besitzerin super freudlich und sehr tolle zimmer, sehr lekeres frühstück. wir werden das hotel auf jedenfall weiterempfehlen und gerne wieder kommen.

9a0043fd4258a1286db1e253ca591662b3aac849.text: väldigt snälla och trevliga på hotellet. tyvärr hade jag klantat mig och bokat fel men det löste personalen smidigt och det är jag väldigt glad för. dock vaknade vi två timmar innan vi tänkt gå upp av att det drog in massa cigarettrök i rummet och bägge började få ont i huvudet av det. trafiken på gatan var i full gång redan vid sextiden också så att somna om efter att ha ställt upp fönsterna var omöjligt. det kändes verkligen som att sova över hos en sparsmakad släktings hus, inget koncept som jag gillade dock. men allt var städat och fint, dock ej rökfritt.
ontzettend aardig personeel! de kamers zijn klein, maar goed en schoon.
das personal war absolute spitze im service, die betten zum träumen geeignet, leckeres frühstück mit individuell zubereiteten eierspeisen, auch das restaurant sollte man unbedingt mal mit einplanen

db38b19b897dbece3e34919c662b3fd66d23b615.text: everything was absolutely fabulous.  just wish the pool was indoors.

amazing staff at check in and check out, in the tap room and also the meritage. above courteous compared to other hotels and it is really appreciated. all staff should be commended for their thoroughness and thoughtfulness. rooms were very clean, comfy and had needed amenities. i loved the lobby area with fireplace, cozy and quiet rooms and overall a restful stay. the most takeaway is the the overall hotel amenities, amazing staff and convenience, you can eat a nice breakfast that won't break the bank, a nice dinner and drink at a very fun restaurant/bar and both in the hotel. next time i hope to stay longer.

db38b19b897dbece3e34919c662b3fd66d23b615.text: they advertise 2 pools and the whole week we were there only one pool was open to the public as appearantly they put too much chemicals in the pool. we normally wouldn't mind but the other pool is quite small and was absolutely packed with young kids.  then we tried to book a massage and they told us they were booked out the 4 days we were there! when you pay the amount of money we payed to stay you would think that they could have all the facilities working. the saving grace was the staff, rachel up at the front desk was very friendly and accommodating. elijah in the tap room bar is a great server and a lot of fun, they should give that guy a raise! the staff makes the stay worth it..

front desk very efficient and kind.  the pool and small gym were clean and comfortable.  nice stay overall and only 10 min drive to boulder.  will come back again.

db38b19b897dbece3e34919c662b3fd66d23b615.text: this hotel was great, clean, fancy and all the staff were super friendly and helpful. they were always so happy to help the guests. all staff everywhere seemed so happy and full of energy to help however they could. the restaurant in the hotel,  the taproom was really good. we ate there 2 nights in a row since it was convenient and good. also they have 2 pool tables and several televisions to watch sports on. it was a delightful hotel and the breakfast in the meritage is really delicious and worth the money. we didn’t do the breakfast buffet but we ordered off the al la carte menu and the breakfast croissant was amazing along with my sons blueberry pancakes. it’s packed with blueberries. the host and staff were super nice and happy for morning time. we had a great experience with this hotel and it was a delight. i would stay here again if it was near my destination. thank you |MASK| for your hospitality and your service, it was a great experience in kindness and professionalism. thank you from a family of 4 from texas!

db38b19b897dbece3e34919c662b3fd66d23b615.text:
friendly staff. decent pool/fitness area. the rooms were nice aside from the fridge being small and while nitpicky, a microwave would have been a great addition as there is no complimentary breakfast. 
 there was a power outage for more than 8 hours and it took the hotel over 5 hours to notify guests, then anohter hour to obtain hot water. very frustrating to start the day. overpriced for what you get, food isn't great and extremely expensive onsite. as long as you have a car , you can get around easily. if you like to golf, probably a fantastic place for you.

reasons: a microwave would have been a great addition

db38b19b897dbece3e34919c662b3fd66d23b615.text: staff was great and food options. excellent. parking was ample. close to boulder.
staff was friendly! property is well kept as well as the amenities!

the staff was pleasant...but a wee bit forgetful! waited an hour for an appetizer order at the pool, but was then told that "the kitchen never got the order". my sister called the front desk from oh to order chocolate-covered strawberries and champagne to be delivered to our room while we were off eloping. again, the staff "forgot". when my sister called again, they delivered it the next day with a card congratulating us - but it was signed by the |MASK| hotel staff!! they took credit for it! pretty bogue! on day 3, i called the front desk at 10:30 am and asked for clean towels. having gotten a feel for their "forgetfulness", we grabbed extra towels from the pool area that afternoon. glad we did, because those towels never came. the rooms are a bit dated and the tv remote and channel guide reminded me of the early 2000s. they have two lovely pools - but why not make one "adults only"? the hot tub was big, but filled with hair and bugs. location was decent - 30 min to downtown denver or boulder. again, the employees were all very friendly, but fell short on the simplest of requests.

reasons: staff was a wee bit forgetful
staff forgot the chocolate-covered strawberries and champagne
employees fell short on the simplest of requests

great pool! huge pool with full bar and a great bartender. although i think they forgot to vacuume the pool bottom.. a few floaters... leaves and bugs in the water.  the rest of the hotel was spotless. great service!  awesome food at the tap house. really relaxing and beautiful hotel.

luxury resort featuring two pools, a hot tub, a spa, a gym and a sauna in room 1140.  the three stars for staff and service is an average of a five for most of the employees we encountered and a one (or lower) for management.  there was something odd from check-in — the front desk couldn’t find the suite and had to go behind to check with the manager.  the clerk appeared to be apologizing in advance.  when we got into the suite, it was evening and the suite was warm but we figured it would cool down.  it didn't - turns out the a/c hardware just wasn’t working.  not a glitch -- broken.  per staff, hotel had been working on the broken a/c, and claimed they thought it was fixed when they checked us in.  isn’t there a pretty simple way to verify whether a/c works?  hotel grudgingly offered to rack rate rooms in replacement, but i had to go to expedia to get the charges ironed out.  boooo!

db38b19b897dbece3e34919c662b3fd66d23b615.text: just perfect in every way! outstanding service! from check in to housekeeping to room service, absolutely totally satisfied

i booked a suite with a balcony.  the large size was very cozy and provided more than ample space for us.  i was traveling with my teenage daughter, so in the morning i would close the pocket doors to the bedroom and allow her to sleep while i worked (i love pocket doors, by the way - very efficient space saver).  
although this was a great feature, the room does need some serious updating.  carpet, drapery, sofa, chair with ottoman, etc. - too much fabric!  nowadays, people want as little of that heavy fabric as possible!
and the obviously dated decor is in need of some serious modernization.
shower was pretty good, except there was a shower curtain instead of a door (ewww).   
towels were well stocked.
housekeeping was superior.  hats off to you guys.
all lamps and overhead bulbs were in good working order.  
robe was provided, which was nice.
a/c worked well, although it made a clicking sound every night (my fault for not addressing it with front desk or maintenance - wasn't bad enough for me to remember until the bedtime).
the pool was pretty nice with an outside bar.  
staff exceptionally courteous and accommodating.  big ups to every department.  
restaurant bar was stocked nicely.  could have used a nicer selection of wines by the glass.
gym was great - superior, in fact.  
ample parking in lot.  well lit and safe.
all in all,good value.  i really appreciated the sitting area. just please, please spiff up the rooms.people feel better with less fabric!

reasons: gym was great - superior, in fact.
housekeeping was superior. hats off to you guys.
the pool was pretty nice with an outside bar.

db38b19b897dbece3e34919c662b3fd66d23b615.text: i called this property on the day of my arrival to let them know that i would be arriving after midnight. the man at the hotel front desk said that he made a note on my reservation, so that my room wouldn’t be given away. well, my room was given away. i arrived in the middle of the night with two children and they said that they didn’t have our room. everyone in our group was staying at the hotel. they gave me a piece of paper and sent me to a nearby hotel of lesser quality. the nearby hotel was charging less per night that weekend and they did not have the mountain view that i had paid extra for at the time of reservation, the hotel said that they would bill the |MASK|, but, instead, there was no bill under my door or anywhere at checkout time. they merely charged my credit card for what i was paying at the |MASK|, regardless of the room downgrade and lesser price they were charging other patrons. i am very disappointed that expedia says there is nothing they can do.

db38b19b897dbece3e34919c662b3fd66d23b615.text: my stay was okay however i did fall in the hotel lobby because of an uneven section in the flooring that is now covered by a chair. i’m going to be okay but i was disappointed that there were two employees present one on the phone behind the front desk and a manager who was chatting with another and neither bothered to see if i was okay until my husband asked the female employee at the desk for ice because i’d fallen and twisted my ankle. they all saw.  the manager who i had to pass by in order to sit in the chair continued chatting with the guest he was already conversing with when i fell. the female employee brought ice and finally asked if i was okay and said if i needed anything she or her manager could assist me. i asked who was the manager, she mentioned his name (but i can’t recall it).  i said oh he’s the guy saw me fall but continued chatting with the other guest and didn’t bother to see if i was okay, he’s the guy i limped past to sit on the chair, and he said nothing, but he’s the manager. the female employee replied yes he’s the manager. she mentions the incident to him and he finally comes over but not before he chats again with the same guest he was chatting with when i fell. he asked if i was okay i said yes but my ankle hurts. he offered some tylenol and i accepted. i also told him to cover that area because someone else could fall and twist their ankle too. a hotel guest who witnessed the incident moved a chair over it to cover the uneven section.

reasons: two employees present and did not check if I was okay
manager continued chatting with another guest when I fell
manager did not bother to see if I was okay

the staff was very friendly and the hotel itself was very nice.  i would have enjoyed the pools and spa had i stayed in the summer months.  

however, the location was not very convenient for tourist.  you definitely need a car if you are staying at this hotel and want to do things in denver, bolder or the other tourist activities.

we have stayed at other omnis before and this one just missed the mark. first, it was under construction when we arrived.  the message we received prior to booking stated that all construction would be finished by october.  that wasn’t the case. due to the renovations, the hotel smelled like chemicals or paint.  we could not use the outside facilities due to inclement weather, but when we went to sit inside in the evening we were told we could not go to the lounge/or any of the seating areas due to a private party. there was an event two nights in a row. there was no place to sit other than our room.  this was a disappointment.  however, the rooms were renovated and clean. the beds were incredibly comfortable.  despite the remodel, the bathroom did not have a working fan.  the location was in a business park which was surprising, but the parking was free.

reasons: the rooms were renovated and clean

starting with the good… the location is great (we had a kid at cu), 100% the staff we encountered seemed uniformly cordial and welcoming, and the public areas of the property are quite nice.

the not so good… we’d reserved a king room but were given one with two queens at check-in. whatever. arriving late our first of four nights, we went straight to bed. in the morning, we discovered our toilet wouldn’t flush. again, whatever. we had to go to the lobby for coffee anyway. but then we tried to shower. it took everything that poor shower had just to spit a meager stream of water 8 inches from the wall. 

so, we bathed alla puttanesca and reported our issues to the front desk. they assured us that maintenance would fix the toilet but that the feeble water pressure was just due to everyone taking a shower at the same time. sure.

when we came back that night, the toilet worked (tho it hadn’t been cleaned) but the sink would now burp up a little drain water every time you’d flush. unfortunately, the shower still dispensed water like a spray bottle. 

the next morning, we went down to the front desk and again complained. this time we given a new room and everything was fine. 
at check-out, i asked about a reduction of the $454 (plus all the taxes) cu graduation rate we paid for each of the first two nights, given that we had a room with such janky plumbing. “sure, i can take off the $25 destination charge.” that’s it? “i will talk to my manager and see what we can do.” evidently, t

title: a fantastic stay at |MASK| |MASK| hotel!

db38b19b897dbece3e34919c662b3fd66d23b615.text: the staff is very accommodating and friendly.  our room and the pool area was clean.  overall a very nice stay but the elevators and the common areas of our floor were not clean.  the elevator floors have not been mopped in some time, the doors, hand rails and buttons were not clean.  i put my hand on something sticky in the elevator and they smell like urine.  food trash left in the common areas stayed on the floor for days.

ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.text: the hotel is nice, staff was friendly but not always available. i needed wash cloths and towels i called downstairs no one answered. i called three more times over a 15 min span. no answer, called back once more was told they would be up 10 min. 30 min later , my sister went down and waited for someone to help her. no one was at the desk for some time. same issue for a blanket needed, had to go down and waited close to 20 min for someone to come to the desk. shower was a little dated, but overall, the property was nice and clean. i would say the biggest issue is the staff being available. however, my encounters with the staff were always pleasant. there was some very loud guest at night, extremely noisy and arguing, however these were guests, i don't blame the establishment for that, just know if someone is arguing, you will hear it as well

reasons: had to go down and waited close to 20 min for someone to come to the desk

ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.text: this hotel is located in a perfect spot, it is close to just about everything in frisco from the star, stonebriar mall, and all sorts of shops and restaurants. the room was beautiful and was the first hotel i’ve stayed in that had hardwood floors instead of carpet. the restaurant and bar were closed due to covid but we frequented many restaurants around us and had no issue finding a place for food and drinks around us. my issue with this stay was that we had to request our room to be cleaned. every hotel i’ve stayed at, ranging in price from $60 a night to $250 a night has cleaned our room for us daily, no request needed. we were informed this was due to covid and being short staffed as the hotel only had one cleaning employee working for the rest of the week. we made a request monday night and tuesday afternoon we saw 3 cleaning women who were near our room who hadn’t gotten to ours yet. it was apparent there were 2 more housekeeping employees present than the one that the front desk informed is we’re working, so this rubbed us the wrong way since we were lied to. i understand water conservation and had no issue reusing towels and bed linens but i was hoping that we could come back to a clean room daily considering we are in a pandemic. if they really were short staffed i understand that, as just about every company is struggling due to the issue that covid is presenting businesses of all kinds, but you would think hotels would have a higher standard of cleanliness.

reasons: we were informed this was due to covid and being short staffed
we had to request our room to be cleaned
it was apparent there were 2 more housekeeping employees present than the one that the front desk informed is we’re working

the hotel is cool looking but a few issues that i just don't understand.  first the elevators.  they are slow.. but the main issue is it has a loud chime it rings on every floor.  like an old grandfather clock.  for me being on the 6th floor having to hear 6 loud chimes every time i went up or down, was terribly annoying and unnecessary, doesn't make any sense and isn't cool or helpful to your customers in any way!  no refrigerator in room,.. sure the room looks neat.. but instead of having some useful bench below the tv would rather have had a refrigerator.  the towel hook in bathroom... why would you install that behind where the door is when it opens?  there is a spot right when the door first opens.  the place it is now, means there's no way to get my towel without walking out of the shower and walking around the door???

ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.text: wishing we had more time to spend in the super cool, funky bar area. unfortunately we were away from the hotel at another event most of our stay.

mold on the shower ceiling. advertised amenities on website we no longer in existence and the staff did not care to make compensatory acts. prices on restaurant menu were cheaper than the items actually rang up in computer.

ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.text: you have to specifically ask for housekeeping if you stay more than one night. we asked at check in for service the following day. we were away and expected the room cleaned by the time we returned at 3 pm. unfortunately it had not been cleaned and we were told they could drop off clean towels and sheets. very disappointing that you can't get full cleaning service and they only give you 2 towels.

ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.text: i recently stayed at hotel |MASK|, frisco, when i arrived i gave the receptionist my last name. he was unable to locate any reservations for me. i showed him my confirmation number still nothing. he was finally able to find my information and he mentioned expedia had not done their part whatever they do in providing the hotel with the booking info. he was finally able to confirm my reservation and from there on everything went smooth. i cannot recommend it enough!  from the moment i arrived, the staff was warm, welcoming, and extremely attentive to every detail. the rooms were immaculate, beautifully decorated, and incredibly comfortable, with all the amenities i needed for a relaxing stay. the location was perfect, close to all the attractions yet peaceful and quiet. overall, my stay exceeded all expectations, and i look forward to returning soon!"

reasons: he was unable to locate any reservations for me
expedia had not done their part
all the amenities I needed for a relaxing stay

our room has a weird dark spot by the ceiling which we were not sure if it was mold or what. the bathroom had hair strands on the floor, there were also hair strands on the pillow cases.rooms do not get serviced, unless you ask/schedule this. there's also no fridge to keep your water cold, when i asked about this--i was directly told that this was to encourage people to purchase from the hotel and/or restaurant. which is ridiculous, since this has nothing to do with keeping your drinks cold.

ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.text: the first night was rough for us because the guests next door were making out through the night creaming and shouting. and this is because the way the rooms are made … there is no sound proof at all. in the morning we complained at the front desk to be relocated to a corner room upstairs. this hotel is nice and clean but the walls should be sound proof. but, we were happy with room 500.. very quiet and peaceful. staff were amazing, house keeping was perfect. i would recommend there take serious consideration in this matter. the rooms on 2nd floor are meant to be connecting room and should be assigned to one family not two different guests. over all, we had a good stay.

ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.text:
we liked having a king suite at a reasonable price. the people at the front desk were super friendly. overall, it was great!
the bathroom in the king suite needs a fan or some noise to make it a little more private. the shower tends to leak water out from under the glass door onto the floor - not sure if they can do anything about that though.
the light switches in the entry room make no sense. i could not figure out how to turn on just one of the lights, except random combinations of the two switches on the door going in and the one switch by the entry to the bedroom. an electrician should fix that as, like i said, it doesn't make any sense how they work currently!
also, the restaurant was a little pricey for the food that they served for breakfast. we found a lot better food at more reasonable prices at other restaurants like "the biscuit". the waitress was not very attentive. 
we were on the 4th floor, which didn't have an ice machine, so that was slightly inconvenient. 
other than those few items, we enjoyed our stay!

reasons: the people at the front desk were super friendly
the restaurant was a little pricey for the food that they served for breakfast
the waitress was not very attentive

ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.text: enjoyed my recent two night stay at the |MASK|.  i would strongly recommend that you set up an early morning coffee station since your restaurant does not open until 7:00am...i had to leave for an early flight this morning (6:30) and could not even get a coffee when i checked out. i saw several other guests in the lobby as well...i think this would enhance the services your hotel provides quite nicely.  thank you.  c.visconti

ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.text: one of the most affordable hotels in the area but it is still one of the nicests. the hotel itself has an amazing and very hip design. our room had this amazing wooden floor that anyone would like in their home. our bed was comfy, not too plushy where you sick right into it and not too hard where you break your back. checking in was fast and easy. we decided to added another night to our room and was able to get it done within a matter of seconds. it is also conveniently located in frisco and is a short drive to all the other cool places in plano. would definitely recommend to anyone who is traveling on a budget but don't want to stay at an inn or motel.

ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.text: the property itself was fine. edward, at the front desk was very kind and professional. the lady working the next evening was not pleasant. i found it odd that they only serve coffee until 10 am. my friend asked for a cup at 9:45 and they were trying to refuse it until he insisted it was indeed only 9:45. they charged for a glass of water! the bar drinks are ridiculously expensive! my daughter’s room key opened to an occupied room, which i’m not sure how their system allowed that. they almost refused her a room altogether because she was just short of turning 21, even though i was right there with her! the rooms have no fridge or microwave, and the fact that breakfast was not complimentary, the price per night seemed too high. to top it off, my friend tried booking another night, shortly after checking out, the lady at the counter didn’t even look up from the computer screen and said they had nothing left, after i was told they had many rooms. so he ended up finding a room at a better hotel for much less money, with better service and complimentary refreshments and breakfast. although our stay was not terrible, i will not be booking there again.

reasons: the lady working the next evening was not pleasant
they almost refused her a room altogether because she was just short of turning 21

they were trying to refuse it until he insisted it was indeed only 9:45

ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.text: beautiful hotel. everything was well-maintained and very nicely decorated. clean rooms.the front desk staff was friendly. no complaints.

i had to cut my stay short here at the property due to a business emergency. staff was very kind in helping me out, and i really want to extend my gratitude to the general manager cory for his kindness and compassion given the difficulty of my situation. staff was very kind, and the hotel was beautiful. the location was very convenient in terms of things to do and dining options.

my only real complaint that i would have is the fact that the rooms don't offer a microwave or fridge option. i feel that having these amenities would be very beneficial, especially if you get food from the restaurant (or restaurant nearby) and need to save it for the next day. it's a pretty big inconvenience, but overall i enjoy the hotel and all the food options nearby. i just wish we could store our leftovers. great hotel in a prime location.

the rooms are modern, clean and so comfortable (with so many thoughtful little conveniences) you want to just relax and stay there. but then you'd miss out on the what hotel |MASK| has to offer in the lounge - big comfortable chairs and sofas, big screen tv's, i could go on and on.
i can't say enough about the staff. omar at the front desk, vanessa in the parlour restaurant, jacob the parlour bartender (makes a perfect white russian), everyone is welcoming and fun. there were many more staffers that i don't know their names but thank you, all of you.
yes, we will be back!!!!!

ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.text: we have stayed at this hotel at least 3-4 times it was my all-time favorite hotel because of beds, housekeeping and space. up until this last stay when the young man who was the breakfast server edwin decided to ignore us over and over again and over. even after a hand wave and smile from my husband for service. my husband then walked up and politely said as he reached for the menus that the young man placed down after my husband waved him down “i guess i have to come get our own menus since you choose to ignore us” and the young man edwin smiled &  walked back to the kitchen. this was a very sad day for me because i had never experienced such discrimination before over wearing a cross. i mean, we do live in america and texas  but to be discriminated & then to be called a liar by the main manager. yep, i kept all the emails, & a letters. yes, i got an apology letter after i had to go through several messages back-and-forth, and the this young man who supposedly wrote this letter, was obviously the manager, and not the actual server that was so obvious. if the young man was truly sorry then the next day when we were leaving…yes, he clearly seen us walking by restaurant he would of come up to us and apologized, but he avoided eye contact, which i tried to gain with him by looking over straight into his face, and he avoided looking at me. it was so obvious & so sad because of that i knew that we would not ever be going back to this hotel again. such a sad experience.

3216b1b7885bffdb336265a8de7322ba0cd477cf.text: overall, i had a very pleasant experience at this hotel.  i was in the process of relocating from the east coast, looking at properties, and found this hotel with a good rating and a fair price. the hotel staff was very friendly and helpful, during my stay.  it's true what they say about california, the weather, and the chill vibe.  the only thing i saw that put a damper on my stay was how one of the young front desk staff yelled and overall mistreated the cleaning staff.  at first i thought he might have just been having a bad day, only to see that it continued happening on other days.  it's not the way people should be treated, and no guest should have to see that during their vacation, business trip, or otherwise a night stay on their way to their final destination.

3216b1b7885bffdb336265a8de7322ba0cd477cf.title: soren helped save this review
3216b1b7885bffdb336265a8de7322ba0cd477cf.text: the location was ok.  it was at least 40 minute drive, thanks to the constant traffic,  to any attraction; beach, la, hollywood, universal studios. it is not in a eye pleasing location and on a very noisy road that you do hear throughout the night.  our first night the attendant who checked us in was not very nice. he gave us the wrong room in a smoking section, when i had requested a non smoking. i did not realize this until the next day.  that was a horrible night!  the people right next to us were very loud and smoked throughout most of the night.  they stood right in front of our door so it kept us up almost the entire night.  the do have a security guard, but unfortunately he visited with them for most of the night. the room was awful too.  it smelled like urine and the beds were hard as a rock.  i was ready to leave. the next morning i went to the desk and met the new attendant.  his name was soren.  he saved my experience for this motel.  i told him of our experience.  he was very apologetic and immediately switched us to another room.  it was now in a non smoking section.  we were pleased that it didn't stink and the beds were actually comfortable. they only drawback, was that we could still hear the road noise at night and it was directly above the breakfast room so we heard the chairs slide around the tile in the morning.  so soren was our hero and saved this motel from getting a 1 star rating.  the breakfast was disappointing,  only toast, cereal and bagels.

reasons: he was very apologetic and immediately switched us to another room
soren was our hero and saved this motel from getting a 1 star rating

3216b1b7885bffdb336265a8de7322ba0cd477cf.text: i wanted to be close to the bike casino and not pay exorbitant room rates and this |MASK| fit the bill.  there was an issue with the reservation (i had somehow booked a smoking room...) and since the hotel was ostensibly full, i had to spend a night in a room reeking of cigarette smoke.  fortunately i was moved to a bigger, double king or queen non-smoking room the next day.  both rooms had standard amenities (fridge, microwave, tv, coffee maker) and were clean and spacious.  this small hotel has a 'courtyard' type setup and most rooms face away from the main thoroughfare (atlantic ave) and there was sufficient parking.  there were no noise issues though the landscapers started a tad early on day 2 with their leaf blowers.   i didn't get to try their breakfast but there is one available.

3216b1b7885bffdb336265a8de7322ba0cd477cf.text: comfortable, nice and quiet. clean

the location is prime, but the room itself was dirty. the only reason i ended up staying was because i needed the room for the night as i drove 2 hours from home and needed to be somewhere that night. the front desk agent had already mentioned they were sold out so i knew there wasn't a chance to be moved to another room. 
i had to disinfect the whole room with my own lysol and sanitizer because i didn't feel comfortable. walking in, the walls were dirty, splattered around the tv area, the wall near the bathroom, and the bathroom itself. the sheets had what looked like burn holes. luckily i brought my own blankets to cover the bed. the bathroom itself needed upkeep, and i ended up not showering because the tub had hair in it. 
i didn't have resort expectations, but i did expect a basic clean room. 
i had thought of reserving for a future trip this month but that just seems unreasonable now. 
hopefully the staff is able to step up their cleanliness of the rooms.

reasons: walls were dirty, splattered around the tv area

3216b1b7885bffdb336265a8de7322ba0cd477cf.text: very nice and clean hotel for family. staff at the help desk was very kind and humble. i will surely love to come stay again

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
situation to rome termini was excellent as we were travelling to the airport by train. plenty of authentic restaurants within a small radius of the hotel.
one of the |MASK| buffet breakfasts i have had. so much choice.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: nice location
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: stayed from 3 nights in this hotel with my wife and baby , location is great and room was ready with baby crib when we arrived , breakfast is ok , no bottled water in the room like most hotels do

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: fantastic location near termini
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: great location for transport links in and out of rome and the metro. all main sight seeing attractions within easy walking distance and a choice of good restaurants and cafés nearby. nice clean and comfortable rooms with helpful and friendly staff.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: tolles hotel beim bahnhof
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: dreibettzimmer gebucht - bekamen juniorsuite im 7.stock mit tollem ausblick! badezimmer großartig mit regendusche und extra badewanne, betten sehr angenehm perfekt zum ausrasten nach dem man den ganzen tag auf den beinen ist. frühstück vielfältig für italienische verhältnisse - tipp: espresso beim kellner bestellen. öffentliche verkehrsmittel gleich ums eck beim bahnhof - somit alles gut zu erreichen und auch leicht wieder ins hotel zurückzufinden. wlan im hotel seehr praktisch. 2 fernsehsender auf deutsch gefunden. auch gepäckaufbewahrung vor checkin und nach checkout hat einwandfrei funktioniert. wir kommen sehr gerne wieder!
good hotel at city centre and for tours by rail - will recommend any time!

reasons: good hotel at city centre and for tours by rail

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: prima hotel, goede ligging
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: prima hotel, op loopafstand van station termini. de hop on hop off bus stopt vlakbij. ook in nabijheid goed restaurant (babbo's) waar je vroeg kunt eten en buiten kunt zitten. het hotel heeft een moderne uitstraling en mist daardoor wat charme. ontbijt is uitgebreid, maar wat vlak van smaak. wij hadden drie nachten verblijf in een kamer voor drie personen. dan is het wel vervelend als je een badkamer hebt die iedere keer blank staat na het douchen. is bouwtechnisch euvel, klagen bij receptie loste het probleem niet op (ondanks belofte iemand langs te sturen). dus: zorg dat je een kamer met bad hebt!

reasons: uitgebreid, maar wat vlak van smaak
klagen bij receptie loste het probleem niet op
ondanks belofte iemand langs te sturen
goed restaurant (babbo's) waar je vroeg kunt eten en buiten kunt zitten

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: |MASK| |MASK| |MASK| hotel |MASK| santini located just across the train station. great location and many good local restaurants and shops in the area.  the city sightseeing bus across the street and also the airport bus.  special thanks to the front desk staff, especially rina! she went the extra mile for us:)

reasons: special thanks to the front desk staff
she went the extra mile for us

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: a really nice hotel - no complaints
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
the hotel is in a nice location close to the railway station with all of the shops in the station complex being very convenient.  it is only a 5 minute walk into the edge of the main (older) part of the city so very well placed.
we flew into fiumicino and decided to use the bus to get into the city as it was the cheapest option and woohoo, the bus terminates directly opposite the the |MASK| |MASK| so is absolutely perfect - don't waste a penny more on shuttle buses or private taxis if you stay at the |MASK| |MASK|..!!
the room is modern, clean with air conditioning and a nice bathroom - all we wanted.  we only ate breakfast there but at three euros for a buffet breakfast it was unbeatable with a big choice of different food from bacon, sausage and scrambled egg to fruit, cooked meats and cheese, pancakes and different sweet cake options - awesome.
the staff are very friendly and helpful - i really would not think of using another hotel if we ever go back to rome again.

reasons: the room is modern, clean with air conditioning
at three euros for a buffet breakfast it was unbeatable
big choice of different food from bacon, sausage and scrambled egg to fruit, cooked meats and cheese, pancakes and different sweet cake options

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: basically the hotel is good in being located very close to rome termini, having a good breakfast and others. but we felt that the room (we used, at least) needs reconsideration on designs of the room facility.
great location near the main train snd subway stations. friendly and responsive hotel and restaurant staff.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: good hotel close to central station
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: big room, lots of space, large bathroom and clean. breakfast was not good at all. bread and croissants not fresh and eggs watered down. staff friendly and helpful. free wifi and computer in lobby with free usage is good for ticket booking. nowhere close by to eat that's decent.

reasons: free wifi and computer in lobby with free usage

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: proche gare centrale
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
très pratique car situé à l'arrivée de la navette aéroport ou à l'arrivée du train grande ligne pour les voyageurs ayant choisi ce mode de transport.  chambre spacieuse au decor contemporain.  présence d'une bouilloire pour café /thé.  
wifi et petit déjeuner : ok.
清潔でしたし、浴槽も広くてよかった
the rooms are very clean and comfortable, and its closeness with the train station it’s extremely convenient.

reasons: the rooms are very clean and comfortable

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 駅近で便利
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
テルミナ駅から徒歩5分ほどの便利な立地にあります。空港からもバスや特急で直行できて、アクセスが良かったです。
ビジネスホテルのような感じで、ローマらしいクラッシック感はないですが、とても清潔感がありました。掃除もきちんとされていて室内は快適でした。
近くにはカフェやレストランもあり、テルミナ駅にはスーパーもありますので、買物にも便利でおすすめです。

reasons: とても清潔感がありました
掃除もきちんとされていて室内は快適でした
近くにはカフェやレストランもあり

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: this property is conveniently close to the termini train station.  walkable distances to most of rome's major sites within the aurelian wall.  staff will call taxis if requested, and taxis show up within 2-3 minutes.  the breakfast has a great selection of food.  all staff are friendly and helpful.  we had a junior suite (king size bed) on the 7th floor with a balcony.  we approximated this balcony to be 22-feet by 5-feet: huge!!!  we enjoyed magnificent views of rome everyday from the balcony, including st.peter's basilica and santa maria maggiore.

we enjoyed our stay in rome at the |MASK| |MASK| |MASK| |MASK|. the staff were nice and helpful.  the breakfast was really nice.  just down the street from termini train station so very convenient for public transport and hopping on the train to get to our next destination.

we stayed one night at the end of our two week italy trip so we would be near roma termini station for an early morning trip to the airport.  easy check-in and check-out.  less that 5 minute walk to termini.  clean room.  did not try the restaurant or other amenities.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: prima hotel!
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
prima hotel. 
prettige moderne kamers. vriendelijk en behulpzaam personeel.
uitgebreid en goed ontbijtbuffet
테르미니 역에서 정말 가까웠으며, 공항 셔틀이 호텔 바로앞에 있어서 정말 편리하였음. 호텔 위치는 최고임

great hotel so close to the train station. everything has been redone so a very modern feel to the rooms and inside property. short walk to the train station. good selection of restaurants in the area. nice little bar in main lobby that has a happy hour with nice munchies. staff was very friendly and helpful.

reasons: nice little bar in main lobby
has a happy hour with nice munchies

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: we stayed only one night in rome at this hotel. it was the greatest value for money. expansive room, great airconditioning. helpful staff. i wish we stayed longer!
the staff were very friendly, the complimentary breakfast was excellent, i would definitely recommend this hotel to anyone visiting rome!
i was given a handicapped room, and the showerhead had issues water sprayed all over the bathroom and i had to mop it up with towels.

reasons: water sprayed all over the bathroom
i had to mop it up with towels

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: close to train station room' was comfortable breakfast was awesome

excellent location close to termini station - easy to find when we got off our train.  also conveniently the bus to the airport stops right across the street from the hotel.  the hotel is about a half hour walk from the colosseum. the room was beautiful - simple but very clean.  would stay there again.

reasons: the bus to the airport stops right across the street from the hotel

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: well located, renovatd, clean, comfortable and excellent breakfast
hotel is central and right next to the first stop of the hop/on/hop/off buss. breakfast is great and inexpensive

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: great location
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: breakfast was good. room was a good size and clean. very close to main train station termini. would definitely recommend.

hotel che si trova subito fuori dalla stazione termini, facile da raggiungere anche senza mezzi privati. 
personale gentile, cordiale, simpatico e sempre disponibile. 
camere ben arredate e ben tenute, con un ottimo bagno a due locali con dia doccia che vasca. 
unica "pecca" sulla cena. mi aspettavo piatti un po piu tipici di roma che, per un turista o qualcuno che viene da fuori regione, sarebbe il massimo. ma, tutto sommato, la cena è buona e con tre portate.

the room/bathroom was really spacious and clean. staff was friendly and promptly responded to any issues we had. location was good, close to the train station with taxis also readily available. my only complaint was that we had no way to turn the air conditioning on leaving the room temperature uncomfortably warm.

reasons: no way to turn the air conditioning on

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: bel hôtel très bien situé
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
cet hôtel est situé tout près de la gare rome termini (trains et autobus). on peut facilement faire le trajet à pied depuis la gare, même avec des valises. depuis l'aéroport fiumicino, il est facile de prendre une navette (bus) pour se rendre au terminus. 
le déjeuner est très peu cher et offre un très bon choix. on nous fournit une carte de la ville gratuitement. 
nous devions prendre un train à partir de la gare rome termini pour civitavecchia (départ de notre croisière). cela s'est très bien fait et le train est très abordable.

reasons: facile de prendre une navette (bus) pour se rendre au terminus
nous fournit une carte de la ville gratuitement

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: アクセス抜群。
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: 空港から移動してテルミニ駅に着いたのが20時くらいだったので、あまり歩かずに済んでよかったです。ホテルの入り口にホテル名が見つけられなくて、フロントスタッフにおそるおそる聞いたら合っていたって感じでした。スタッフはフレンドリーとは言えず、淡々としていました。ホテル周辺はcoop(スーパー)やレストランもたくさんあるので便利です。翌日はバチカン観光に行きましたが、やはり観光の拠点にするには駅近でよかったなぁと思いました！駅周辺は観光や旅行の人が多く、治安が悪いような印象もありませんでした。

reasons: 周辺はcoop(スーパー)やレストランもたくさんあるので便利です。
観光の拠点にするには駅近でよかったなぁと思いました！

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: very pleasant and helpful staff encountered throughout the stay. we had an inside room and a/c kept up with the 37 degree temperatures while there. meals had in the evening at the on-site restaurant were excellent!

reasons: kept up with the 37 degree temperatures
meals had in the evening at the on-site restaurant were excellent

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: hôtel bien situé près de termini centrale mais mal insonorisé. c’était ok pour une nuit avant de reprendre l’avion. personnel très accueillant et sympathique.
great location adjacent to rome termini; really easy to get buses into town or trains to and from destinations. great breakfast buffet with good coffee.

good location.  very close to train station.
airport shuttle and city bus tour right in front.

reasons: city bus tour right in front

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: very comfortable room for 3, next to termini
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: very comfortable beds, and the great buffet breakfast had everything you could want to eat, for €3 a person!

reasons: great buffet breakfast had everything you could want to eat

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: the property location was great.  it is walking distance to termini station.  room was clean and well maintained.  washrooms are decent size as well.  the only drawback is that shower does not close off fully resulting in water spilling out on the floor.  i suggest fully enclosing the shower area with either glass or a shower curtain.

reasons: room was clean and well maintained

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: easy access to hotel from termini and easy to go to airport by shuttle bus in front of hotel.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: walking distance from rome termini, hoppe n off tour bus . has  excellent hotel staffs  services.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: poor facilities
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
the room is too hot as the air-conditioning cannot be controlled by each room, so we were told to open the windows. 
and i cannot image that the lifts at noon time (peak hour of check-out) were stopped (keep stopping at other floors), so i had to hand carry my luggages to the ground floor.

reasons: the air-conditioning cannot be controlled by each room

ローマテルミニ駅から近く便利。

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: o pessoal que nos atendeu foi ótimo, em especial a patrizia no café da manhã e o souré na recepção. além do pessoal maravilhoso, o café da manhã, as instalações, o quarto são ótimos. a localização é muito conveniente, os meios de transporte estão muito perto. fizemos muita coisa à pé.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: the room was clean and efficient, but the bathroom fixtures were dumb. we were splashing water everywhere when trying to wash hands or use the shower. the location near the train station couldn’t be better. would still recommend staying here

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: everything and more. breakfast is a 10/10

the hotel was well located for us. close to termini station.  rooms were clean and all the staff were friendly and helpful.  breakfast was standard hotel breakfast but was more than adequate.  a cappuccino machine would have been nice but staff would make one upon request.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: excellent location close to termini train station
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: comfortable stay, bed was very comfortable and breakfast is excellent value for 3 euros per person.

colazione nella media.

notre séjour était court mais très agréable. le personnel - réception, petit déj, femme de chambre - tous étaient gentille et compétent. chambre spacieuse et très propre et pas de bruit dans les chambres. petit déjeuner très bien et bon rapport qualité-prix. je reviendrais

they were at a convenient location.  they safely stored our luggage before check-in hours and when we checked out but had lots of time to get to the airport.

テルミ二駅が近いです。朝食も安いのに種類も沢山あって良かったです。お部屋もバストイレも綺麗でした。

the hotels close location to the train station and one of the hop-on bus stops....magnificent! pretty nice people and definitely a decent property but the furniture in the room is this neon backlit, 1990s modern design that is very impractical. you will stub your toes on the end of the bed as the bed supports exceed the end of the bed. the bathtub shower, which is nice, is difficult to get into and out of and is slippery. there are no bathmats.  that said, the hotel has a nice staff and they are very helpful. the restaurant is good but it is less expensive to walk a hundred yards to dozen's of choices.

reasons: less expensive to walk a hundred yards to dozen's of choices

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: el hotel es lo que nos ha salvado del viaje a roma
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
como era de esperar el viaje a roma ha sido agotador, por eso el hotel nos ha permitido recuperar fuerzas.
todo ha estado magnífico: la habitación con terraza, bien diseñado, funcional y moderno, baño con ducha y bañera, la cama impresionante de calidad y tamaño, el desayuno muy bien, con café expreso si lo pedías.
lo recomiendo sin ninguna duda.

reasons: con café expreso si lo pedías

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: hotel muy bonito y bien comunicado.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: nos sorprendio la cantidad de facilidades prestadas en el hotel, la red wifi, y lo moderno que era el hotel por dentro. esta apenas a 50 metros de una de las estaciones de tren y metro mas importantes del centro de roma y la comunicacion con los diversos puntos era optima. si volvemos, repetiremos hotel casi con toda seguridad. gran experiencia y muy amable todo el personal del hotel.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: nice for a night.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: good hotel for one night stay near the central train station. somewhat overpriced as the standard rate does not include breakfast, which is fairly standard at other hotels of the same quality/location.

reasons: standard rate does not include breakfast
fairly standard at other hotels of the same quality/location

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: poor customer service
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: my family and i stayed at this hotel at the recommendation of princess cruise line. we were told it was a premiere hotel in the center of it all. boy were they wrong. the hotel is located near the train station, so tons of sketchy people were walking around at all hours. we walked home from a restaurant at about 8pm and got to see the truth of the area. homeless people were sleeping up and down the streets, and camped out directly across from the hotel. also, the hotel sold us some city sightseeing tickets for a hop on/hop off bus. we were told that the bus ran every 10 minutes until 10pm at night every night. imagine how upset we were when we stood outside on the corner waiting for the bus for over an hour and a half with about 8 other people who were also waiting. when we called the hotel to say we were stranded and that no bus had come, we were blown off. the young lady who answered told us "we only sell the tickets, we don't run the company." i felt that was the wrong attitude to have. at the very least, since we were guests of the hotel, they could have sent a shuttle for us, or at least offered to call the bus line, since they sold us the tickets. all in all, the hotel is mediocre, but topped with bad customer service, in a sketchy area, i would say do not stay here.

reasons: the young lady who answered told us 'we only sell the tickets, we don't run the company.'
I felt that was the wrong attitude to have.
we were told that the bus ran every 10 minutes until 10pm at night every night.
we stood outside on the corner waiting for the bus for over an hour and a half.
when we called the hotel to say we were stranded and that no bus had come, we were blown off.

we booked the property because of its proximity to the termini station. the area is busy but so are most areas in rome. the room was comfortable and we could regulate the room temperature. the bathroom glass wall is not a favourite- open the light and the bedroom is lit up so that aspect (for us) was not great. there was a kettle with powder coffee and tea, a small refrigerator which contained items for purchase. the reception was welcoming, helpful and solicitous

지금껏 업무상 최소 80여개 가까이 많은 호텔들을 이용해 봤다고 생각하는데, 

여기 직원분들 대박 친절합니다.

프로정신을 투철합니다.  이분들 덕분에 잃어버린 텍스리펀 서류까지  복사본을 메일로 받아서

무사히 신고도 마치고 기분좋게 귀국할 수 있었습니다.

저렴하면서 직원들 친절만큼은 별 5개를 드려야겠네요.

방 크기나, 조식은 조금 부족하지만,  로마중에서 저렴한 호텔이니 이 정도면 만족을 합니다.

이탈리아를 14일 자유 허니문 여행을 했는데, 가격대비 최고의 호텔이라고 생각합니다.
