823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: location of hotel in rome's transport hub.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
good quality of room and facilities. buffet breakfast is of wide choice and standard.
service attendance is good from staff.
sehr freundliches personal,  leckeres frühstück und saubere zimmer
조식이 매우 훌륭하고, 룸컨디션도 좋았습니다.
only few minutes walk from the termini. the breakfast is nice.

역과 가까워 체크인하기 편리했습니다.
깨끗한 시설이 마음에 들었습니다.
프런트ㅠ직원들이 친절했습니다.

ao lado do termini, muito prático para aeroporto e trens. tem parada de ônibus turístico em frente. funcionários atenciosos e café bem variado. foi a segunda vez que me hospedei nesse hotel, recomendo!

reasons: tem parada de ônibus turístico em frente

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: sehr zentral
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: es war alles bestens. zimmer gut. personal freundlich und hilfsbereit. frühstück gut. besonders erwähnenswert waren die günstigen preise in der bar.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: goed hotel, vriendelijk personeel. prima bedden.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: goed hotel, vriendelijk personeel. prima bedden. dicht bij alle bussen en metro. taxistandplaats voor de deur. alle bezienswaardigheden op loopafstand te bereiken (max een half uur). ontbijt prima, vers en wordt constant aangevuld. prima prijs/kwaliteit verhouding.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: ok hotel , would return for the location only
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: ok hotel, |MASK| feature is its closeness to termini where you can access anywhere in rome from.  disappointing breakfast and while staff does their job they don't do much more. lacks security esp in the breakfast area where no one even confirmed room number or if we were even staying in the hotel

reasons: lacks security esp in the breakfast area where no one even confirmed room number or if we were even staying in the hotel

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: tutto benissimo!
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
l'hotel si trova a pochi metri dalla stazione termini.
e' la terza volta che scelgo questo hotel per il mio soggiorno a roma insieme a mia moglie e ci siamo sempre trovati molto bene! tutto perfetto, dalla pulizia della camera alla colazione abbondante.
ci ritorneremo sicuramente
convenient to termini train station,  comfortable clean room. was great for the need of just an overnight waiting for our flight home.  front desk staff friendly and pleasant.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: good location and fantastic breakfast
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
we have stayed at the hotel |MASK| |MASK| three times now and have never been disappointed, although this was the first time we had an inside room, would prefer a street view and if we go back to rome, i will certainly request one.
they also stated that there were international newspapers available by the reception, we only saw 1 american paper on our last morning...but the breakfast was wonderful

reasons: we only saw 1 american paper on our last morning

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 駅近で立地は良いホテル
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: 今回2泊しました。立地が良いので選んだのですが、ハウスキーピングが良くなかったです。使ったコップもそのままです。フロントに電話するとレストランに回されレストランの従業員には取りに来いと言われました。中途半端なお部屋の管理が残念でした。

reasons: フロントに電話するとレストランに回され
ハウスキーピングが良くなかった
使ったコップもそのままです
レストランの従業員には取りに来いと言われました

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
基本的にはほぼ満足でした。
なんといってもテルミニ駅近くの立地！石畳の上を大きい重いスーツケースをひいて歩くのは、本当に大変なので、これは本当に助かります。
治安が悪いと書かれている場所ですが、7月の21時くらいならまだ人通りもあり、そこまで危険じゃないかと。もちろん、警戒は必要ですが！フィレンツェに行く予定もありましたし、朝早くからのバチカン観光からのアウトレットへのバスに乗る、という予定でもホテルで一息つけて、かなり役立ちました。
部屋にドライヤーも冷蔵庫もあります！喫煙者の母と泊まり、部屋ではタバコを吸えませんが、ホテルの中庭みたいなところでタバコが吸えました。屋根付きでソファとテーブル、灰皿があり、割と一人でも安全そうな感じでした。部屋は清潔で、十分な広さもありました。
しかし、シャワーの扉が斜めで完全には閉められませんでした。3泊の間に一度停電がありました。設備自体は古いのか？？と思いましたが、十分な宿泊ができたと思ってます。

reasons: 部屋は清潔で、十分な広さもありました
ホテルの中庭みたいなところでタバコが吸えました
屋根付きでソファとテーブル、灰皿があり

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
o hotel é super moderno pra roma! mto bem localizado pra quem precisa de metro ou ônibus. 
tem um shuttle bus na frente do hotel q leva até o aeroporto por 6 euros e sai a toda hora. tem um hop on hop off tb no msm ponto. é mto limpo e os funcionários são mto cordeais! voltaria com ctz! 
quarto grande e bonito! 
solicitei berço e fui atendida com mto carinho! super recomendo!

reasons: leva até o aeroporto por 6 euros

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: テルミニ駅に近くのホテル
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
テルミニ駅に近く　活動しやすい。
部屋も毎日　シーツ交換するほど。浴室も毎日洗剤できれいに掃除している。その為　掃除に時間がかかり　ホテルライフが制限される。

reasons: 毎日シーツ交換するほど
毎日洗剤できれいに掃除している

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: decent hotel next to roma termini
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
i specifically chose this hotel given its proximity to termini.  i wanted a hotel near the subway & train given we were only staying a couple of days and using the train to get to our next destination.
overall the room is fine for a couple of days.  its a little tight for two people with big luggage but we managed. 
room was clean, main lobby was clean. the price was right for the location.
good location, easy to get to airport and also across the rest of rome. surprisingly quiet given the location. king size bed and a bath were a bonus
ホテル内レストランでディナーを取ったが、待ち時間が長過ぎる。
rudw staff (not all, but most of them. only one nice lady at the front desk, the men where rude). street cleanliness was terrible.

reasons: only one nice lady at the front desk

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: great location for getting around rome
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: friendly helpful staff. nice room we liked the little free extras like the small snacks at the bar

reasons: the little free extras like the small snacks at the bar

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: loved staying here! delicious breakfast and right next to the train station.

staff was outstanding! very helpful. front desk helped arrange a late check out (child had a rough night, so the extra time allowed time to recouperate); the breakfast staff were warm, welcoming and always smiling; housekeeping delivered extra towels right away...everyone was just wonderful! would definitely recommend this hotel.

reasons: staff were warm, welcoming and always smiling
helped arrange a late check out

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
the bw |MASK| |MASK| is located next to roma termini which is very convenient and central esp in terms of transportation. it is also safe despite being next to train station and not noisy. 

we enjoyed our stay as the room is quite spacious and the staff was friendly. however, what really disappointed us was the billing problem we faced. they charged us twice even before we checked in. while they refunded us promptly after we discovered the error, we suffered an exchange loss of euro 90 becos of billing in our local currency. when we wrote to hotel after we returned to ask for the additional refund since the loss was purely due to their error, they ignored our email and after a reminder a week later, it was radio silence. how can a reputable chain like bw made such an error and not respond to client’s email???

reasons: it is also safe despite being next to train station

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: great location next to the main station. room was great and breakfast excellent. good location for all the sights of rome
very nice modern hotel. o love the decorations.  staff is very nice. rooms ate clean and comfortable.  close to termini.
buena ubicacion. silencioso. comodo..desayuno muy bueno. personal calido y amable.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: fint hotel sentralt
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: hotellet ligger sentralt til, enkelt fra flyplassen.

at around 2:00 am on 11/19, i was surprised by the loud knock on my room twice, and when i complained to the lobby on the phone, i experienced the disrespectful rudeness of saying sorry that i did it by mistake and hanging up the phone first. i felt very bad. his voice sounded like he was drunk. it's a very pathetic and stupid this guy should cut it for your hotel

reasons: said sorry that I did it by mistake
his voice sounded like he was drunk

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 川沿いの静かなホテル
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: ロケーションは良いがスタッフの中で感じの悪い人が数人いるので非常に残念だ。wi-fiのレスポンスが悪い。

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: good location close to station
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: very friendly helpful staff , comfortable room - airport shuttle bus and sightseeing bus stops next to hotel

reasons: airport shuttle bus next to hotel

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: excellent location close to station & tour buses
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: good location, very comfortable room, breakfast quite good, staff very pleasant although a bit miserable at breakfast time!
excellent stay in great location and with very helpful staff

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: sehr zu empfehlen
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: tolles freundliches personal, wunderbare lage, komme gerne wieder
we liked the location next to termini and the staff was very nice and helpful.  it was also nice to have a coffee bar and restaurant on premises

reasons: nice to have a coffee bar
nice to have a restaurant on premises

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: テルミニ駅に近くてとても便利。内装や設備、フロントの対応、荷物預かりなど、どれも満足のいくものでした。

reasons: フロントの対応が満足のいくものでした
荷物預かりが満足のいくものでした

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: this hotel and staff were wonderful.  we had a jr. suite and it was very spacious and comfortable...	 highly recommend the extra $$.  very close to shopping and many restaurants.  only complaint, and this may be all over europe, there was not a way to get an ice bucket.  they sent our ice in bowls!

reasons: very close to shopping and many restaurants

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
메인역에서 걸어서 5분도 안걸리는 거리라 너무 좋았음.
한국이 직원이 있어 체크인시에 매우 편안한 마음으로 진행할수 있었음.
약간 고급 모텔 느낌이 나긴 하지만 욕조도 있어서 반신욕도 하고 전신거울도 보기 편한 곳에 있어서 좋았음.

reasons: 체크인시에 매우 편안한 마음으로 진행할수 있었음

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: great breakfast.  close to many restaurants and transportation options.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: great launching area for exploring italy.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
hotel is on par with |MASK| westerns in the states. bed wasn't terrible comfortable but after walking all day you will sleep well regardless. staff is awesome, always happy - always helpful. check-in and check-out was extremely easy and hassle free. 

italian tv is not something you can watch and enjoy. be sure to bring an hdmi cable/connection for your phone or tablet so that you can stream netflix or another service.

reasons: check-in and check-out was extremely easy and hassle free
italian tv is not something you can watch and enjoy
be sure to bring an hdmi cable/connection for your phone or tablet so that you can stream netflix or another service

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: pésimo el servicio de front desk, súper groseros
great location if you want to be near the train station. standard |MASK| |MASK| hotel and friendly staff

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: albergo funzionale in pieno centro ( termini )
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
tre giorni di vacanza a roma, abbiamo scelto il treno come mezzo di trasporto e l'albergo era comodissimo.
personale gentilissimo e preparato per consigliarci visite guidate e non e cene. 
inoltre l'ultimo giorno mia moglie non stava bene (influenza) e il ricevimento ci ha lasciato la camera a nostra disposizione tutto il giorno, fino alla nostra partenza (serale) senza alcun addebito.
da consigliare vivamente

reasons: ci ha lasciato la camera a nostra disposizione tutto il giorno
personale gentilissimo e preparato per consigliarci visite guidate e non e cene
personale gentilissimo e preparato per consigliarci visite guidate e non e cene

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: nice location near train station
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: very friendly & helpful staff...breakfast was not the |MASK| but average in europe i have found...

nice hotel in a convenient location next to termini. it was easy to use the metro from the hotel to get to all the tourist sights during our stay. plenty of restaurants in the area. the hotel was nice and the staff was very friendly. the breakfast was enjoyable and i would recommend |MASK| to anyone.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: excelente escolha em roma!
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: equipe atenciosa. ótima localização. quarto excelente (exceto a cama). café da manhã muito bom.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 동양친화적
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
위치가 우선 최고입니다
방음은 살짝 아쉽네요. 그래도 조식괜찮고 시설깨끗하네요. 한국인 일본인 넘쳐납니다. 서울인지 도쿄인지 헷갈릴정도네요.

totally impractical and potentially dangerous bathroom setup. no handholds in deep shower/tub making it hard to get in or out. no shelves, hooks or towel bars near sink and tub, towels are in the toilet room instead. ?????

reasons: totally impractical and potentially dangerous bathroom setup
no handholds in deep shower/tub making it hard to get in or out
no shelves, hooks or towel bars near sink and tub
towels are in the toilet room instead

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: 로마역에서 가깝고, 주변 관광지 접근성 좋음, 직원 매우 친절하고 조식 좋음, 호텔 방도 창결하고 조용함.

차별과 무시를 당하고 싶으면 이 호텔을 가면 된다.이 호텔의 체크인 카운터 직원들은 차례가 된 사람이 앞에 서도 무시하고 댓구하지 않는다.짜증스런 힐긋거림 만으로 반응한다.불쾌한 눈빛과 무시를 당하고야 겨우 응대 받을수 있다.그나마 보다 못한 백인 여직원의 개입이 있어서 체크인 받아줬는지도 모른다.물론 동양인에게만 그럴 것이다.심지어는 체크 아웃 후 맡긴 가방을 찾으러 갔을때는 손짓으로 물품 보관소를 가르키더니 턱짓으로 나한테 보관소에 들어가서 내 물건을 꺼내라고 하더라.그 짜증스러운 얼굴들이 이 호텔의 얼굴이라면 받아들이든지 가지 말아야 한다.
이탈리아는 원래 그런다고? 아니다.이 호텔은 이탈리아에서 네번째 묵는 숙소였고 다른 곳은 모두 친절하고 맡긴 짐은 조심히 꺼내서 가져다 주었다.
다른 여행중에 어쩌다 느끼는 차별적인 언사나 행동이 매끄럽지 못한 의사 소통 때문이라고 생각했었는데,여기 이 호텔은 아니다.이 호텔의 체크인 카운터는 개새끼들이 맡고 있다.
호텔 관계자들이 이 글을 보고 믿어지지 않으면  내가 체크인,체크 아웃한 시간,짐을 찾아간 시간대의 cctv를 확인해 봐라.과장이 아닌 것을 알게 될것이다.

reasons: 불쾌한 눈빛과 무시를 당하고야 겨우 응대 받을수 있다
백인 여직원의 개입이 있어서 체크인 받아줬다
손짓으로 물품 보관소를 가르키더니 턱짓으로 나한테 보관소에 들어가서 내 물건을 꺼내라고 하더라

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: nice hotel well located next to the train station.  very nice and clean rooms.  staff was friendly and helpful.  the breakfast was very good too.  highly recommend.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: nice hotel and close to transportation hub,
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: the check in was smooth as was the stay at the hotel

we enjoyed our stay at the |MASK| |MASK|. we liked the location close to the train station and the bar staff was especially nice. gianni was very helpful with questions and had a great sense of humor!
we would definitely stay there in the future.

reasons: the bar staff was especially nice
gianni was very helpful with questions
had a great sense of humor

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: mooi hotel, goede locatie vlakbij grote station. handig als je met de trein naar rome airport moet. allerlei ov mogelijkheden in de buurt maar ook prima te lopen. hotel is schoon, bed ligt lekker.

reasons: handig als je met de trein naar rome airport moet

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: just across the road from rome termini station giving easy access to the metro lines and the express train back to the airport. large modern family room with all the usual features.

reasons: easy access to the metro lines
express train back to the airport

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: the location was excellent. all staff was very friendly, especially the always smiling and happy lobby attendant.

reasons: especially the always smiling and happy lobby attendant

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
the hotel is very nice and the location is |MASK|. 
the staff was friendly and the breakfast was very good. 
i highly recommend stay at this hotel.
convenient location and super nice continental breakfast, esp. freshly squeezed orange juice and handmade cappuccino

location is excellent, easy to get around. 
our room became very hot, room temp control did not work
overall our stay was very good.

reasons: room temp control did not work

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: professional staff very kind and helpful. very convenient location

reasons: professional staff very kind and helpful

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: very close to the train station, which was very convenient.  room was very clean and bed comfortable.  i like that the bathroom had a tub and separate shower.
breakfast was good.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: nice hotel close to train station and shops
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: check in till check out is all great.  staff is friendly and accommodating.  listen to your inquiries and needs.  room is spacious enough for 3 adults.  breakfast is great with varieties.  clean and near to train station, shops and restaurant.  will definitely stay here again if in rome.  will recommend this hotel for sure.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: small, clean, nice hotel near to centrale roma
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
the hotel gave us a free upgrade which is great. despite the upgrade, the room is very small but it’s clean and comfy. the breakfast had to be paid but reasonably priced at euro$5 per pax. tried their dinner - tasty and reasonably priced like other restaurant out there. 
we had a morning tour that ended at check out time and the hotel was really nice to allow 1hr extension so that we could be back, changed and checked out.

reasons: reasonably priced at euro$5 per pax
tasty and reasonably priced like other restaurant out there
the hotel was really nice to allow 1hr extension

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 중앙역에서 도보거리
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: 중앙역에서 도보거리로 주변 관공지는 걸어다닐수있어 매우 편리합니다. 시설도 깨끗하고 객실도 청결합니다.

|MASK| |MASK| |MASK| hotel |MASK| |MASK| had a perfect location for the end of our trip. close to the train station, even closer to the sit bus to terminal shuttle.

check in was a breeze, we had the pleasure of dealing with adam f. he was extremely polite and cordial during the duration of our stay.

property had all the amenities one could ask for. nice clean room, restaurant/bar in the lobby, and outdoor sitting area. 

if ever returning to rome, would definitely stay at the |MASK| |MASK| |MASK| hotel |MASK| |MASK| again!

lovely hotel with nice clean room and comfy beds. very welcoming, helpful and friendly staff. good selection to choose from at breakfast time. ideal location for exploring rome and a stones throw away from the main train station with easy access to the airport.

reasons: good selection to choose from at breakfast time

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
a comfortable hotel in a great location next to roma termini, the metro and opposite the buses for airport shuttle & hop on off bus. easy walk to the main bus terminus. rooms were spotless, restaurant and bar well priced, good food and generous snacks served with drinks at the bar.
staff were friendly and helpful. our compliments to the restaurant & bar manager, she was an absolute delight. other options for breakfast outside the hotel with cafes and the rail station available.
we spent 4 nights there and definitely recommend to others visiting rome.

reasons: opposite the buses for airport shuttle

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
great rooms; the staff were very helpful & friendly.
fantastic location!

reasons: the staff were very helpful & friendly

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: perfect stop after long train ride and they arranged transport to the airport the next morning. slept great, very quiet and comfortable

reasons: arranged transport to the airport the next morning

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: not up to 4 star mark. noisy air conditioning; non-working bathroom sink. is definitely close to train station.

le personnel est vraiment très gentil et très attentionné 
les plats servis au restaurant sont excellents 
l'hôtel est juste à côté de la gare et du métro 
très pratique

reasons: les plats servis au restaurant sont excellents

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: friendly staff and close to transportation

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: location, location, location
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: the hotel is very central - train station, rental car return and airport shuttle bus to the airport. it is also very close to the the piazza della repubblica,via nazionale and the trevi fountain.

reasons: very close to the train station
airport shuttle bus to the airport

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: super hotel total zentral super service wir würden wieder dort hin kommen super leckeres frühstück

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: nice hotel, close to station termini and city
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: nice hotel, close to station termini and central to major sites. room very clean & quiet. great breakfast for 5 euros.

perfect location. easy travel to train stations, souvenir shops, foods. room is spacious, very fancy, amenities good. the guy with a tattoo on the neck and arm in the reception is a bit snobbish. not smiling, not accomodating, seems angry, not an attitude of a good customer service

reasons: the guy with a tattoo on the neck and arm in the reception is a bit snobbish
not an attitude of a good customer service

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: 駅にもスーパーにも近く、部屋も広い。朝食も充実している。

perfect location just a few minutes away from termini station. 
room was nice and clean but only drain was slow or blocked.

洗面台の排水口が初日から詰まっていて、ガッカリした。しかし、明朝、その旨を伝えると部屋に戻るとなおしてくれていた。
部屋は狭いが、清潔でした。
テルミニ駅から近いので、交通、ちょっとした買い物、食事に便利でした。

reasons: その旨を伝えると部屋に戻るとなおしてくれていた
テルミニ駅から近いので、交通、ちょっとした買い物、食事に便利でした

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: el accesso de noche es mug obscure

nice hotel near the train station, taxi and some really great restaurants. 15 fo 20 mins walking distance away from the roman attractions. loved that they gave us a cell phone where we could make long distance calls as well as gps to get around. highly recommend!

reasons: 15 fo 20 mins walking distance away from the roman attractions

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 로마 테르미니역에서 도보4분 탁월한 위치!
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
전반적으로 유럽 호텔치고 깨끗하고 깔끔했습니다.
테르미니역에서 도보 4분 정도 거리로 이동도 편리하구요
룸 안에 커피포트가 있어서 이용하기 편리했습니다.
그리고 조식인 1인 5유로인데 꼭 드세요 !! 가격대비 너무나 만족스럽습니다.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: フレンドリー
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: 早朝のチェックアウトでも問題なく清算完了ができました。おじさんの対応もよかったです。朝食も問題なし。高層階の場合は、バスタブは無。禁煙ルーム優先でシャワーです。

reasons: おじさんの対応もよかったです

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: close to station and restaurants.  can walk to most major attractions if you're energetic.  room was large and comfortable and breakfast very good but it is the station right across the road that is the big winner.

all night construction noise across the street was very challenging! 
no notice was given to us prior to arrival that this was the case.

reasons: all night construction noise across the street was very challenging
no notice was given to us prior to arrival that this was the case

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
역에서 가깝고 시설 좋음 
직원들도 친절하고 저녁 비행 전 짐도 안전하게 맡길수 있음 
단점 조식이 좀 부실함

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: central location with a/c
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: the room was very nice and clean. working a/c was also a much needed relief from the heat after a long day of walking tours of rome in the middle of june. taxi, bus and train locations are one block away.

reasons: working a/c was also a much needed relief from the heat
the room was very nice and clean

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: excellent choice
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: excellent choice of hotel near train station with low budget. good and cheap breakfast with a lot variaties. 3 mins walk to the train station. the big surprise is the free handphone  inside the room so you no need to buy another tourist sim for internet.

reasons: good and cheap breakfast with a lot variaties
free handphone inside the room so you no need to buy another tourist sim for internet

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 靠近車站很方便
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: 早餐很棒，房間舒適雖然不大，但整體價格及設備都很好了！值得入住的飯店，對於自助旅行的人很好找到，早餐再次稱讚

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: テルミニ駅至近
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: 2015/12/26-2016/1/1までセミダブルベッドに夫婦２人で宿泊しました。日本人が寝る分には十分な広さです。部屋も小さ目でしたが、スーツケースを１つ、キャリーバックを１つ広げられました。朝食ビュッフェもハム、ベーコン、パン、フルーツなど、品目は少ないですが、おなかを満たせます。ここの売りはなんといっても、テルミニ駅からすごく近いこと。隣接と言ってもよいくらい。到着日は２２：００頃、国鉄テルミニ駅についたので、疲れていて、大きな荷物をもって歩きたくないなと思っていると、マルサラ通り側出口のところからｈｏｔｅｌ　ｓａｎｔｈｉｎａの文字が見え、安心。翌日の地下鉄やバスターミナルの利用も、歩いて２、３分くらいで快適でした。駅地下にスーパーもあり、いったん買ったお土産を部屋に置いてから、また出かけたり、周辺の観光名所を歩いて、トイレに戻ったりとありがたかった。室内もきれいで、スタイリッシュな感じです。カードキー管理で、外出時もフロントに預けずに行けます。アクセス面を重視して、きれいなホテルを探している方に押しのホテルです。

reasons: 品目は少ないですが、おなかを満たせます
カードキー管理で、外出時もフロントに預けずに行けます

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: ローマテルミニ駅に近い
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: ローマテルミニ駅に近く、個人旅行者には大変便利、周りにイタリアンの食事の店は少ないが、駅まで行けばかなりある、個人的感想だが、中国人宿泊客がかなり多く、あちらもそうだと思うが、少し嫌になった、夜中に廊下で大声で歌を歌い、中国語でどなりちらしていて目が覚めた、中国人御用達のホテルなら次回は利用しない。

reasons: 廊下で大声で歌を歌い
中国語でどなりちらしていて目が覚めた

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: close to train station, but zero sound proofing. can hear everything from people leaving and returning to their rooms at all hours, and housekeeping banging and bashing through the rooms next door and above in the morning. no sleep ins here! also, be careful not to leave valuables in your luggage if you are storing them with the hotel after you check out - they will allow anyone to go in and walk off with bags unattended (no one asked us for our bag tags when we returned to retrieve our bags) and also if you attach anything to your bag (e.g., travel pillows, plastic bags), they won’t ask you to remove it but will simply take them off and throw them on the floor after you leave, so they can pack your bags up high on racks. we ended up having to run back to the hotel from the train station as we only noticed our stuff was missing when we got to the station.

reasons: banging and bashing through the rooms next door and above in the morning
can hear everything from people leaving and returning to their rooms at all hours
no one asked us for our bag tags when we returned to retrieve our bags
they will allow anyone to go in and walk off with bags unattended
if you attach anything to your bag, they won’t ask you to remove it but will simply take them off and throw them on the floor

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: perfect location to catch a bus tour of city right at the terminal.

reasons: perfect location to catch a bus tour of city right at the terminal

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 効率よく観光したい方向けです。
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
インターネットで申し込んだ現地ツアーの出発時間が早かったため、集合場所に指定されたこのホテルを手配しました。
空港行のリムジンバスの停留所も目の前なのも、良い点です。
いわゆるビジネスホテルの部類です。
朝食はブッフェ形式で、肩ひじ張らないのはよかったです。

reasons: ブッフェ形式で、肩ひじ張らないのはよかったです

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: great location (1 block from train station), great room (nice decor and big tub), great breakfast (good value fo 5 euros).

super clean hotel and staff was really nice. we liked the easy transportation to and from the airport with the proximity of the train station, but it was a little walk to the city center where most action is happening so expect to walk about 1-2km to get to the colosseum or the fountain and 3-4km to the vatican! our room was ready ahead of time which was super helpful and we got a late checkout so we were really grateful for that. would definitely stay there again!

reasons: easy transportation to and from the airport

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: this was a great hotel with a beautiful view of the marina and mt. vesuvius.  the 7th floor garden restaraunt has a stunning panaramic view of the harbor and the volcano.

reasons: stunning panaramic view of the harbor and the volcano
beautiful view of the marina and mt. vesuvius

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: great location and wonderful hotel rooms.  the morning breakfast was also a big plus - abundant with lots of choices.

the room was nice and clean, people at the front desk were nice and got us into a room as quickly as possible - we were very happy as we’d just come off of a long flight. the a/c takes a while to cool down the room and didn’t get as cool as i’d like - but certainly cooler than outside, no trouble sleeping.

reasons: people at the front desk were nice
got us into a room as quickly as possible

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: we were treated great, the property doesn't have smoking rooms as advertised, however there is a wonderful set of rooms with balconies.  couldn't have been more pleased with our stay

reasons: the property doesn't have smoking rooms as advertised

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: テルミニ駅近のリーズナブル&ラグジュアリーホテル
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: テルミニから徒歩5分のリーズナブル&ラグジュアリーなホテル。フロントの女性も丁寧な対応で感じが良かったです。

the staff were very friendly and approachable and the service was excellent. the hotel is a 2-3 minute walk away from the roma termini station so you have easy access to the regional trains, buses and metro. also, the sit airport transfer service stops just opposite the hotel so it is very convenient.

this was a very convenient hotel with good access to the airport and other cities.
they kindly accommodated my late check-in.
however, the fire alarm falsely went off at 4am and continued to ring for about 30 minutes, so i couldn't get a good night's sleep.
even so, a tip was taken in addition to tax when i was billed, which bothered me.

reasons: they kindly accommodated my late check-in
good access to the airport and other cities

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: front desk very helpful. restaurant staff very good.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: top hotel in top lage!!
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: personal sehr nett, zimmer sauber,ruhig, sehr gute frühstück

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: molto accogliente e pulito
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: siamo stati solo 2 notti....personale gentilissimo e camere molto pulite e moderne!!!ci siamo trovati benissimo!!!  ps la colazione e' ricca di tutto dal dolce al salato

reasons: ricca di tutto dal dolce al salato

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: this hotel in very central to the roma termini which was great. we had a lovely room which was extremely comfortable and spacious. the staff were very helpful.  it was a lovely modern hotel and the breakfast was good. would definitely stay there again and would recommend it to friends.
숙박중 전기가 끊겨 아무것도 할수 없음에도 호텔 스태프는 할 수 있는게 앖다며 아무 사과도 하지 않았고 겨단으로 7층까지 다녀야 했음. 위치가 매우 좋고 체인호텔 임에도 불구하고 폄점은 최악임

reasons: 호텔 스태프는 할 수 있는게 없다고 말했다

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
the staff was extremely professional and helpful. the hotel was across the street from the train station which made it ideal for a place to stay between cities and travel.  the rooms cooled off fairly quickly.  there was shampoo, conditioner, shower gel, hand soap, and lotion in the bathrooms.  the walk in shower had great pressure.

i would return.

reasons: the rooms cooled off fairly quickly

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: tres bon acceuil, personnel à  l'écoute et souriant
everything about the hotel was great except for the air conditioning in the rooms. it was 90 degrees f both days we stayed and the ac just couldn't get the room cool.

reasons: the ac just couldn't get the room cool

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: excellent location (in front of ternini station). our rate also included breakfast which was very convenient.
every day we had to request face cloths! other than that little issue everything else was perfect!

reasons: every day we had to request face cloths

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
테르미니 기차역,지하철역,코나드슈퍼도 가까워 편리.
힌식당 가인도 가까움.

워치가 좋고 깔끔하여 추천함.

reasons: 대개 남부투어 출발이 호텔 앞이나 근처라 편리

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: the hotel was conveniently located. the room was smaller than i expected, but it was okay. the room was clean. i wish the restaurant had more options on the menu.

reasons: i wish the restaurant had more options on the menu

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: als stadthotel ideal
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
trotz touristik und stadthotel mit standardreception u.servise bringt zum frühstück patrizia die persönliche und professionelle note rüber.wie ein privates hotel.
von diesem hotel aus ist rom mit allen fahrtmöglichkeiten zu erkunden.
würde ich immer wieder empfehlen.(familientreffen mit 27 übernachtungen)

reasons: Patrizia brings the personal and professional note over

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: great location (a block from the mian train station) great accomodations (including wonderful bathrub), and great breakfast (for 5 euros).
location from airport and location from hop on- hop off bus

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: いろんなバスがホテル前から出てて便利
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: スタッフの対応は全然、良くないと思いますが、テルミニ駅からすぐで判りやすく、ホテルの真ん前からいろんなツアーバスや空港行きバスが出てて便利。スタッフはかなり感じ悪いけど、チェックイン、チェックアウト、朝食時以外は接する事がないので(^.^)

reasons: スタッフの対応は全然、良くないと思いますが
スタッフはかなり感じ悪い
ホテルの真ん前からいろんなツアーバスや空港行きバスが出てて便利

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: the location of this hotel is excellent. it is within easy walking distance from the main train station in rome (roma termini). it is also a quick walk to the metro with access to both line a and line b which you need for the vatican and the colosseum. there was also lots of good places to eat around the hotel for dinner and a well stocked supermarket around the corner to get some snacks/ fruit etc. friendly staff  who all spoke english. i would definitely recommend this hotel  as a great place to stay when in rome.

reasons: lots of good places to eat around the hotel for dinner
well stocked supermarket around the corner to get some snacks/ fruit etc.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
very clean
safe and great staff
have been here many times
駅近で立地は大変良い。スタッフも親切でした。部屋のモダンな内装も良かった。朝食も豊富で美味しかった。唯一、シャワーブースと洗面の排水が悪く、使いにくかった点が難点でした。

reasons: スタッフも親切でした

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: location is good. poor service.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: hotel is very close to train station. reception staff is not friendly. we called reception and ask for help as the ventilation in room is quite bad. the staff who answered the call was not helpful and only advised us to open the window. upon our request, he said he would send someone to check the ventilation system of the room. no one showed up for 30mins and only came after we chased again. another instance we requested a fork and towel to be delivered to our room. again, no one showed up and in the end i need to go down to chase and the reception staff asked me to get the fork from the resturant myself. don't feel that this is a four-star hotel service standard.

reasons: staff who answered the call was not helpful
asked me to get the fork from the restaurant myself
asked me to get the fork from the restaurant myself
I need to go down to chase

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: rome visit
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
the weather was excellent and we had booked 2 guided tours.
breakfast at the hotel was well stocked and provided us with a good start to the day.
you do need to be very careful on the subway relative to pickpockets. my wallet was taken just before a subway exited the station but i exited the train and confronted the thief who returned my wallet.
the proximity to the main train station is a good feature and the express train to/from the airport is well worth the cost.

reasons: provided us with a good start to the day

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: clean and safe

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title:
위치좋고 현대적이고 가성비 좋은 호텔
추천합니다
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
시설이나 위치 다 좋아요.
조식은 맛 없지만 매우 저렴합니다.
직원친절도는 보통.
아무튼 충분히 숙박할 가치 있습니다.
추천합니다.
check in staff were not very polite

テルミニ駅からもとても近くて便利でした。
ホテルはとても小奇麗で、スタッフの対応も良く心地よかったです。
次回も機会があれば宿泊したいと思います。

reasons: スタッフの対応も良く心地よかったです

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: this hotel is good. it’s easy to go to the bus and train station. the staff is good and the morning buffet is good. however the fridge isn’t cold and the staff forgot to refill the soap, shower cap and the facial tissue. will come back again.

reasons: the staff forgot to refill the soap
the staff forgot to refill the shower cap
the staff forgot to refill the facial tissue

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: didn’t care for hotel personally. overrated for what they offer.  i could have stayed down the street for cheaper and better accommodations. our room was literally 90 degrees and opening the window with full sun doesn’t help. i was told the air conditioning wasn’t available, because technically it was their winter. maybe recirculating the air in the room may have helped a little, but they didn’t accommodate our request.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: テルミニ駅近で便利
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
チェックイン時の説明が丁寧でわかりやすかったです。対応も良かったです。

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
although this hotel isn't located "next door" to any of the major attractions in rome it does have a few important things going for it.  firstly, the hop on-hop off bus stop is directly across the street from the hotel which makes getting to all the attractions a snap. secondly, rome's main train station is only steps away.  inside the station are numerous shops and fast food restaurants as well as car rental agencies so everything you might need is easily accessible under one roof.

now to the hotel itself. it isn't "grand" but it is quite nice. there is a restaurant although we never used it, choosing to sample some of the other establishments in the area. front desk staff were friendly and helpful. the room itself was very nice. comfortable and modern. we got a kick out of the adjustable mood-lighting.  one night we left it on to fill the room with a nice soft, red glow although we could have also chosen green, blue or white as well. 

a very welcome feature was the free cellphone provided for the duration of our stay. maybe it is only a feature of the premium rooms, but what a perk! it was preloaded with an app that connected you to area restaurants and attractions and also included no-charge calling, including overseas. i carried it all around rome for three days and used it both as a guide map and for phone calls. 

if i were to find myself in rome again, i would have no hesitation using this hotel as my go-to property.
離車站非常近，步行約5分鐘，房間很舒適，員工服務態度一般，周邊餐廳選擇多，可惜不包早餐，如到酒店享用早餐，需付7歐一位，感覺比較貴
夫婦二人なのでダブルベッドにしましたがスーツケース二つを広げるスペースがなく、失敗したなと思いました。朝食やスタッフのサービスも何も問題ありません！
great start for our trip to rome. comfortably slept off jet lag, had a great breakfast, then explored!
sadly the transportation that was arranged by them was late picking us up

reasons: transportation that was arranged by them was late picking us up

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
the rooms are beautiful, clean, and spacious (considering it’s europe).  the location is perfect.  it’s right across the street from termini so it’s very easy to get anywhere (e.g., the colosseum and roman forum are only 10 minutes away by subway).  even though the large train station is across the street, you can’t hear it (or the many buses and shuttles that arrive and depart).  there’s a beautiful basilica about a five minute walk from there, shopping, a movie theater, etc.  i would stay at this hotel again for sure and i would recommend it to friends & family.


the staff at the front desk were friendly.  there were only two rude employees we encountered (when i asked for an iron for my room) but the rest of the staff made up for it.  

with regard to breakfast, it’s not that good, but it’s edible. they didn’t put out any pancakes 3 days, which wasn’t good because that meant we were stuck with unsalted scrambled eggs.  that’s okay, though because there are 3 mcdonald’s across the street (two inside the train station, and one on the other exit of the termini).

also, if you go on tours, many of the shuttles that do hotel pick up will pick up and drop off at the hotel or termini because it’s in the city center.  i don’t think we could have picked a better location in terms of accessibility (e.g., when we had to get to the vatican it was a short subway ride; the tour company for pompeii was able to pick us up and drop us off; airport transport arrives to termini).

reasons: they didn’t put out any pancakes 3 days
we were stuck with unsalted scrambled eggs
the staff at the front desk were friendly
the rest of the staff made up for it
it’s right across the street from termini
many of the shuttles that do hotel pick up will pick up and drop off at the hotel or termini
it was a short subway ride to the vatican
the tour company for pompeii was able to pick us up and drop us off

駅近なので便利です。係員の対応は日本と同様なものは期待してはダメです。ヨーロッパ人だからか、私が日本人だからか分かりませんが、笑顔や丁寧さというものはありません。部屋は普通です。朝ごはんも普通です。

ホテルと関係ありませんが、テルミニ駅でチケットを自動機で購入してると、駅員でもない人が手伝ってくれようとしますが、必ず断ってください！チケットとお釣りが出てきた時に1ユーロくれと迫って来ます!!

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: sehr schönes hotel in super lage!
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: das hotel ist ca. 3 gehminuten vom bahnhof termini entfernt und somit optimal für einen stadturlaub gelegen. ich war das 2. mal in rom und habe das 2. mal in der nähe von termini gewohnt. das vorurteil, dass in dieser gegend viele "komische" menschen sind, kann ich nur teilweise bestätigen. ich komme aus berlin, im vergleich finden sie nicht mehr oder weniger merkwürdige (obdachlose) menschen. das hotel ist sehr modern, die zimmer waren sehr sauber und gut ausgestattet. das frühstück war für römische verhältnisse sehr gut, man darf keinen deutschen standard erwarten, aber wir wurden immer gut satt. preis/leistung haben gestimmt.
sehr zentral, problemloser check in, frühstück und minibar günstig. ideal für einen kurzurlaub in rom.

close to the termini so easily accessible transportation and lunch options. the hotel restaurant is excellent. staff is very helpful, especially patrizia, federica, natalia and adam among others. we’ve stayed here before and will stay again!!

we stayed at the hotel for about five days. on our checkout date, we discovered a bed bug in our room and immediately reported it to the front desk staff. when their staff came to investigate, we felt that they initially tried to deny it was a bed bug, suggesting instead that it could be a “bad bug” that flew in during housekeeping. however, after further and more serious discussion, they ultimately admitted that it was indeed a bed bug. we also took a picture of the bug. unfortunately, they did not offer any meaningful solution to address our concern about possibly bringing these highly contagious insects home with us.

since we had an international flight to catch, we left the hotel and were promised that their management team would conduct a formal investigation and get back to us the next day. after we arrived home, however, we did not receive any follow-up email from the hotel until we reached out ourselves. even then, they merely tried to downplay the issue, saying that insects might enter hotels through guests’ luggage and that it is an unavoidable risk for travelers.

for a hotel that charges nearly $400 per night, it is extremely disappointing to receive such a response. i am certain that i will not stay at a bw hotel again.

reasons: they initially tried to deny it was a bed bug
did not offer any meaningful solution
did not receive any follow-up email
suggesting instead that it could be a 'bad bug' that flew in during housekeeping
insects might enter hotels through guests’ luggage

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: excellent location, just steps from termini station. very clean, well run hotel, very friendly and professional staff, excellent temperature in the room and absolutely fantastic water pressure. highly recommend 👍

one of the very few places to have a king size bed. 

the chair and sink are terrible. the chair is trying to be too artistic but takes up too much room. the sink is not practical, the tap is at the corner of the sink causing the water to splash everywhere meaning you can’t place things around the sink area as everything there would get wet.

the room is customizable with various hues such as red, green and blue. it’s an unnecessary artistic gimmick which may be a few seconds of intrigue that’s unnecessary.

with all that said, other than the weird chair that takes up too much room, the weird sink, it actually isn’t too bad. breakfast is reasonably priced, and just downstairs making it incredibly convenient. would recommend overall.

a very nice hotel with an unbeatable location. it is a 5-minute walk away from termini’s east entrance with smooth surfaces all the way, which is extremely convenient for your luggage’s wheels (if you’ve been to other italian hotels, you know cobblestone streets can be awfully rough). rooms and bathrooms are spacious, ac works well, elevators are fine and staff is friendly. breakfast is available from 6:30-10:30 and loaded with options. they also do late check-in, especially if you call in advance! i arrived at 2 am because of a missed connecting flight and they had everything prepared for a hiccupless check-in. an excellent experience all around. 10/10 would recommend and book again!

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: could use some refurbishing, but decent anyway.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: we expected to have a jacuzzi for the kids, but sadly they do not have one due to restrictions or (stupid) laws.  that bummed us out a little.  the beds were soft, but probably too soft, as i woke up with a bad back both nights.  like....really bad.  breakfast was good!  nice to have hot options, one day there was even biscuits and gravy, omelets, and other they had bacon, eggs, and biscuits.  kids loved the pancakes.  the tiles outside are very dated in the courtyard.  and the design wasn't smart - you can't roll the luggage rack to your door in some rooms.  we had to walk up some stairs back and forth to carry in our luggage.  it was nice being in walking distance to a lot of things on cannery row.  overall it was decent, but i wish i had slept better.  sofa bed was very squeaky, so every time hubby rolled over it woke me up.  nice that there are tub/showers, so the kids could have a bath.

check in was super easy, covered parking is close to the entrance and everything was clean. the neighborhood is also very walkable and we're in close proximity to the shops and restaurants.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great getaway
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: while there is no view, the staff was great and the location is perfect for the aquarium and cannery row. it is clean, with wifi and parking.  the breakfast was better than most free hotel food. i would definitely stay here again.

wonderful experience can't wait to return again:)
and enjoy the beach and the shopping.
great breakfast for the family. close enough to walk to the aquarium and restaurants .would stay again!
for the price of the hotel you would think they would have more amenities however it felt like a motel 6 instead of a |MASK| in. the access to my room had stairs and was not handicap accessible.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: we got a good price for a stay during the week and we chose this hotel because parking was included. typical |MASK| inn with great location and clean.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: stayed for one night on the way down the coast.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: very nice hotel.  room was big enough for a family of 6.  breakfast was very good with several options.
front desk was very helpful

walking distance to fishermen‘s wharf and cannary row! clean and bright facility. easy self parking
breakfast could be improved!
location, breakfast and helpful information at the desk wednesday evening at the wine and cheese. very informative- on what to do south of monterey. thank you.

reasons: helpful information at the desk wednesday evening
very informative- on what to do south of monterey

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: location is conveniently close to the aquarium and restaurants. breakfast is great and there is a 24 hour coffee and tea station. the staff was nice enough to let us use the large communal table for board games at night. we will return to this property in the future.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: what we expected
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: the hotel is small with only 44 rooms but very clean.  the staff was friendly and carried out all requests for early check in, extra pillows etc.  breakfast was as expected and wine and cheese in the evening was very nice perk.  what makes this hotel great is its location.  the path for cannery row is literally across the street and you are shopping within a couple of mins.  it is about a 5 to 10 min walk on the path to the aquarium and if you take the path in the other direction from the hotel fisherman's wharf is about a 15 to 20 min walk.  the hotels free parking is located right under the hotel, and we didn't need to drive anywhere once parked.  everything was within walking distance.

reasons: we didn't need to drive anywhere once parked

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: was very clean and staff was very friendly

it was a nice place, close to everything we wanted to see. it was a bit noisy at night that the walls couldn’t insulate. most staff members were friendly except for one of the front desk staff who came across confrontational.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: decent hotel,  good location
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: a comfortable hotel located conveniently near cannery row and the aquarium.  it's a drive to the wharf.  parking is onsite.
parking was a plus. its being renovated, but there were no problems. didnt even notice any noise or disconfort

reasons: didnt even notice any noise or discomfort

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: bathtub in the bedroom!
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text:
good location 
quiet 
a little tired
good breakfast

good location for walking to shops on cannery row. hotel was built with lots of different levels so many stairs to maneuver. located on a busy street so lots of traffic noise. room was clean and comfortable.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great!
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: very close to the cannery row and aquarium. friendly and helpful staff. covered parking, good breakfast included. not the place for you if you want to swim- there's no pool/spa. our room was large and clean.
the bed was amazing. the breakfast bar in the morning was perfect with fresh pancakes from a really cool machine. it is super close to cannery row.

reasons: perfect with fresh pancakes from a really cool machine

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: conveniently located a block away from canary row. we didn’t have to drive anywhere but we did take the trolly to fisherman’s warf. the beds were very comfortable, that’s a must for our family when traveling. the continental breakfast was good, some great options. overall it was a great stay! would recommend.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: perfect location, great room and nice staff.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: stayed for one night on a quick trip to monterey. my bf and i wished we could have stayed longer. the hotel was great. staff were friendly. the wine and cheese event is a nice perk. the breakfast was great for us. the location could not have been any better, one street over from cannery row. walking distance to everything!!!

reasons: the breakfast was great for us

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: i enjoyed staying the |MASK| inn |MASK| because the staff was professional, helpful and friendly.  the breakfast is pretty tasty.  my room was a deluxe king so it was very spacious with a nice view.  the only downside is the rooms are very pricey.  other than pricey, i would highly recommend this hotel.

simple but convenient hotel with nice staff and breakfast. great for kids. note, lots of stairs. 

a bunch of ants invaded our room but that was likely due to heavy rains while we were there
parking is very tight for big cars/suvs. overall very nice staff.

reasons: parking is very tight for big cars/suvs

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: the hotel is located strategically right next to the beach, restaurants, and cute little shops in the cannery. the free breakfast was a great perk. parking is straightforward, with a small garage right underneath the hotel. when we came back on a friday night around 9 pm, all spots were taken. however, there is plenty of street parking as well.

reasons: the free breakfast was a great perk
the hotel is located strategically right next to the beach

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text:
i really liked the location, breakfast and parking at the hotel. we came to the area to see the aquarium and it was walkable with a stroller for 2 young children. 

the bed situation could have been better. i didn’t anticipate the beds which were doubles being so small. i felt like my back hurt from the bedding, maybe it was too soft for my comfort? and when i asked for any additional types of rooms i was told the property was sold out.

reasons: i really liked the location, breakfast and parking at the hotel
i really liked the location, breakfast and parking at the hotel

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: the facility was in a great location, but access to the room was difficult. we are in our seventies and dragging luggage up and down stairs was very difficult. ice machines and vending machines were 3 floors away. probably won’t stay there again.

reasons: access to the room was difficult
dragging luggage up and down stairs was very difficult

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: clean room. i like the dove personal  hygiene products that are by thhe sink and in the shower.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: totally met expectations.  location is great.  no elevator to 1st floor so be prepared to carry luggage and front desk associate was wicked nice and helpful and offered to find someone to help us.

reasons: offered to find someone to help us

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: always comfortable and clean. nice remodeled lobby. good breakfast, pancakes, eggs, bacon, fruit, cinnamon rolls. coffee all day in the lobby with good creamers. close walking distance to everything we want to do without being too pricey.

our room was clean, but for what we paid i expected a little bigger room. the beds were comfortable, but because of the social distances our hot breakfast was packaged cold foods.
we might stay again once this virus is over to try the hot breakfast. then maybe i can rate a little better.
|MASK| inn was conveniently located to both the wharf and cannery row, both an easy walk.  free underground parking was another plus.  check-in and out was quick and efficient.
very clean,staff are friendly,breakfast are excellent.easy access to the freeway.
would recommend to anyone wanting to stay near cannery row. easy parking, good breakfast, large and clean rooms
staff service excellent, good breakfast. clean and spacious room. great location

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: good hotel with free parking near cannery row.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: good hotel near everything around cannery row. we parked our car and walked everywhere. located just off the monterey bay coastal trail as well. we were able to walk to downtown monterey as well as pacific grove.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great location
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: we loved the room. it's in a great location close to everything. the room was large and clean. hotel staff was very friendly. the wine and cheese in the afternoon was a great snack. nothing special but agreat snack. breakfast was better tha just fruit and muffins but again nothing special.
it was in a very prime location, everything was very accessible
great value with a great location, ocean views, free parking, and free breakfast. would book again in the future.

good location for walking cannery row.  comfortable mattress.  very good breakfasts.  so good to have the parking on site.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: gutes frühstück , kaffee den ganzen tag kostenlos zur verfügung .

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: when we stayed at the |MASK| inn |MASK| it was the last stay of a long journey and because of the staff, it was the most memorable. the rooms were clean and welcoming and the breakfast was an added plus. the parking has something to be desired but with everything else considered it was a mild inconvenience. i would highly recommend the |MASK| inn |MASK| in monterey.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: great location right off the seafront. underground parking for guests so you don’t have to street park. room was nice and clean, staff was great!

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: nice hotel with friendly staff. i like that everything is walking distance. awesome breakfast and i love that checking out is at noon. they could improve on parking space, there wasn’t enough parking to accommodate our vehicle on the premises.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great location, w/in walking distance to everythin
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: loved location. easy to locate with parking. great room size for 3 adults.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: staff is amazing
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: i cannot say enough positive things about our stay in monterey. from the moment we arrived max and the rest of the evening staff welcomed us with open arms. they were extremely helpful. joseph and the morning crew were just as helpful. the room was very nice and the walkability was perfect for getting to everything we wanted to do. i would recommend this hotel to anyone.

frınt frak ayağa was great

reasons: way too far from the beds

nice proximity to things that are walkable. parking was a little limited for large vehicles but the front staff was helpful to make sure we had somewhere to park. rooms were clean and comfortable with reasonable prices.

todo estuvo muy buen, el desayuno rico
exelent hotel good location i’m recommend to everyone the breakfast exelent i’m come back for next time i like it,

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: only complaint was hallway noise.  we could hear every time anyone passed our room outside.  hotel walking distance to cannery row and to the aquarium.  the walk to the wharf was doable, but a bit longer.  the room was much more spacious than i was expecting.  very comfortable.  appreciated the free breakfast.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: unmittelbare nähe zur cannery row
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: wir wurden sehr freundlich empfangen. das hotel ist einfach, aber sauber. das im preis inbegriffene frühstück war gut. es gab alles, was man für den start in den tag benötigt. das hotel hat keinen fahrstuhl. das gepäck wurde uns ohne nachfrage in die 3. etage getragen. bei schönem wetter kann man im innenhof verweilen. bei uns war das wetter leider nicht so schön. zur bekannten cannery row mit geschäften und restaurants sind es nur wenige schritte. zum fisherman´s wharf etwas weiter, aber dafür ein schöner spaziergang.

reasons: das im preis inbegriffene frühstück war gut

very friendly staff and great location.

the staff was great, the breakfast was substantial, and the hotel is within walkable distance of the aquarium and restaurants. the room was nicely furnished and immaculate. my only concern was that we were at the back, which borders foam street. traffic sounds were often an issue--fortunately, not after 9pm, however. i would stay here again, but would request a room further to the front  or on the side of the facility.
i wish i knew about all the stairs. i would have asked for a first floor or handicapped room. wish it also wasn’t so expensive.

hotel in einer ausgezeichneten lage. aquarium und cannery row quasi um die ecke.

zimmer und anlage sehr sauber.
im innenhof sitzplätze vorhanden.
location is excellent. clean. breakfast was good.

very clean room with a great balcony. close drive to fabulous wineries. the staff was friendly and helpful - would come back to stay.
we had a great room overlooking the water.  hotel staff at the front desk were super friendly and helpful.  breakfast was great with lots of options and continually being refreshed.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: we are in our 60s and found the hotel very hard to manoeuvre with luggage. too many stairs. great location and very friendly staff.

extremely quiet and perfect spot for the beaches and the aquarium

renavated and in good clean condition 
good breakfast.

staff was friendly and the property was well kept. the complimentary breakfast was great. the property was within walking distance of almost everything. the only negative was our room was street side and next to where the dumpster is. the 5am trash pick-up was little annoying but tolerable. would definitely stay there again

the levels are all split, so although there was an elevator, you still had to carry luggage up half a flight of stairs twice due to the layout.  monterey is dirty and like a cheap carnival.  tourism blogs over rate it dramatically!  wish i knew about the close proximity of carmel, it was way way better!

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great location and clean!

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: nice no frills hotel with extensive breakfast
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: nice clean rooms and secure underground parking. breakfast was great as were the staff. nothing fancy here but a nicely located hotel for the seafront and cannery row shops and restaurants.

staff is super friendly and helpful. the breakfast was good. basic but nice for kids. the beds were very comfortable. lobby is nice. hotel rooms are out dated but this is location is awesome. we were very close to the aquarium and it was an easy walk to get there. definitely would stay here again because the parking is free and the staff is nice.

they should either close or offer half rates while doing renovations. my mother had a horrible time getting to and from the room and breakfast. also the bathroom door would not close all the way!!!!(sliding door) kids and grandma couldn't carry their bf trays to the room we had to eat in down the stairs on their own...

reasons: kids and grandma couldn't carry their bf trays to the room
we had to eat in down the stairs on their own

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: we had a wonderful stay here. the location of this hotel was perfect for walking to the wharf or cannery row. the hotel was clean and the staff was really friendly. the breakfast in the morning was a huge plus for us.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: quiet, clean,affordable
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: personal very helpful, very clean rooms, the daily breakfast a plus, good parking,

we booked this hotel last minute. it was a small room but the perks of this place is the location. we parked our car and never moved it until we left. we were able to walk to all the locations we wanted to visit. the monterey bay aquarium is a short walk away. i needed to stop at a drug store and cvs was even shorter away. want a starbucks? just a few minutes walk or a small coffee shop literally across the street. lots of little beach access points all over within walking distance. the room was clean, the staff was nice, and if you eat meat they have a very nice offering of breakfast for you. i don’t eat meat, so the breakfast didn’t appeal to me but they did have pancakes and other items i could eat. they have coffee and hot tea available all day in the lobby. i would definitely book this place again if i was to return.

reasons: we parked our car and never moved it until we left
lots of little beach access points all over within walking distance

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: glad we chose to stay here!
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: nice hotel, very clean and comfortable. staff is friendly, breakfast is good and we also enjoyed a small afternoon break with cheese and crackers. i stayed with my little one and was happy that everything was walkable: beach, shops, restaurants, acquarium. bike rentals is just a few steps away as well as a bus stop from where free trolley could take us to fisherman's wharf and monterey downtown. when we plan to come back, we'll book it again!

reasons: everything was walkable: beach, shops, restaurants, acquarium
bike rentals is just a few steps away

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: nice hotel close to the aquarium
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: nice hotel with free breakfast and with wine tasting in the evening. close to the aquarium and plenty of parking

convenient location, clean. 

power outage at check in lasted 30 minutes

reasons: power outage at check in lasted 30 minutes

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: friendly staff and clean room
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: my fiancé and i wanted decided to stay overnight in monterey. i checked in and the staff member at the front desk was very friendly and was full of enthusiasm. he made me feel very welcomed and gave us a wonderful room with a nice view. the room was very clean and the bed was extremely comfortable. i highly recommend this place to anyone who is looking for a good place to stay that is within walking distance of cannery row and the aquarium.

reasons: very friendly and was full of enthusiasm

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: nice hotel
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: comfortable beds and pillows and the rooms are updated. the free breakfast in the morning was nice and the food was good. they also have a free wine and cheese reception nightly in the breakfast area and during the month of august they had pancakes from 8:00 pm-12:00am. the staff was very helpful in giving us directions and suggestions of restaurants. the layout of the hotel is a little odd but not a big deal. they have a very nice outdoor courtyard too. the hotel is well maintained. i would stay here again.

reasons: the free breakfast in the morning was nice
they have a very nice outdoor courtyard
they also have a free wine and cheese reception nightly

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: l’hôtel est en rénovation c’est perturbant quand on arrive mais finalement c’est bien organisé. la réception est au 2ème étage, les chambres sont propres, l’hôtel est calme et le petit déjeuner est très complet.

the location was excellent and the rooms were very nice and very clean.  once the lobby construction is complete, it will likely be very nice.  but in the meantime, the hotel entrance is completely under construction, utterly barron.  it was offputting to arrive at night and not find a reception area (poor signage directing us to look for the hotel reception area on second floor).  but the rooms themselves were good quality and the location was terrific, so we will stay there again after the lobby is installed.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: greatly located conveniently in between all stores and beach drop downs. the room was clean and organized bed very comfortable. did wish i had a microwave in room but other than that great experience.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: it’s was great stay and the room were clean and comfortable to sleep in. my daughters enjoyed it too.

excellent place to stay when in monterey. close to everything. spacious rooms and free breakfast and parking was excellent. also, sergio  were wonderful hotel managers as he pointed out where we can go and was just so helpful to us. thanks |MASK| inn! we highly recommend this hotel.  my family and i truly appreciate everything. free parking, free breakfast, nice and clean hotel rooms and close proximity to the cannery row. thanks a lot!

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: location
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: we stayed here for a one night quick trip to monterey. this hotel is convenient and reliable. it is walking distance to the aquarium and downtown, the breakfast in the lobby wasn’t great but it was pretty good. eggs and sausage were luke -warm,  but there was a wide variety of pastries fruit yogurt etc and my youngest  really liked the pancake machine.  it was nice to have it right there and not have to go out for breakfast. the room was clean and quiet.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: staff was super helpful. i spoke with at least 5 staff members and they're all kind and welcoming. the room was very clean. the location is just the best as well, they also offer free parking!! definitely staying here again!
very good and clean 😃
great location. walking distance to lots of restaurants and beach. friendly staff. checking in and out was quick. room was nice, had no complaints. would recommend this hotel.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: amazing hotel stay
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text:
my friends and i had a field trip at the monterey bay aquarium for one of our classes so we decided to book a hotel here so we didn't have to drive a far distance in the morning. 
this hotel was absolutely perfect for our stay. the staff was very nice and the room was clean and comfortable. in the morning they had the most delicious hotel breakfast i had ever had. they literally had the best omelettes, bacons, biscuits, muffins, fruits, pancakes, you name it! they even had a fridge with not just any yogurt but chobani yogurt!! the good brand! they restocked the breakfast area during the entire breakfast: it was great service. 
another bonus was that the staff allowed us to keep our car in their parking garage until after our field trip was done ( around 4) even though we had to check out by 12. this was perfect considering the fact that this hotel is near everything! literally walking distance to the aquirium and walking distance to cannery row. truly great stay for a great price!! :)

reasons: the most delicious hotel breakfast i had ever had
they literally had the best omelettes, bacons, biscuits, muffins, fruits, pancakes
they even had a fridge with not just any yogurt but chobani yogurt
they restocked the breakfast area during the entire breakfast
the staff allowed us to keep our car in their parking garage until after our field trip
this was perfect considering the fact that this hotel is near everything
they even had a fridge with not just any yogurt but chobani yogurt

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: short walk to the beach and restaurants. bed was very comfortable...

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great trip!
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: arrived to a beautiful sunny day in monterey! check-in went smoothly and quickly. room was large and very clean. hotel was in a great location! i traveled with my sister and her 5yr old daughter, along with me having to carry my infant son in a front pack- we were in perfectly comfortable walking distance to the aquarium and the wharf in the opposite direction. the complimentary breakfast the hotel provided in the lobby was one of the better ones i've ever seen from a hotel. i normally dont even partake in the offering lets just say, however my niece wanted a snack the first morning as we got ready and when i seen all they had to offer, i quickly made myself a little goodie plate lol! the following morning i was excited to grab one of the delicious muffins i had grabbed the morning prior. overall, it was a great, very much needed little get away and i would definitely stay here again!

reasons: one of the better ones i've ever seen from a hotel
i quickly made myself a little goodie plate
excited to grab one of the delicious muffins

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text:
the location was really good. but the hotel itself is  clean but needs so much improvement. we have reserved two rooms and they both smells (the carpet). good thing i always bring my lavender infussion machine so it helps eliminates the smell.the bathroom needs more thorough cleaning especially the sink. lots of black stuff in the drainaige part which is so yucky. had to spray it with microban. surroundings were kinda of noisy, we can hear everyone from walking, running, 
showering etc. overall, staff are great and location is really good. but the price is kind of not what we expected for the room outcomes.

reasons: the bathroom needs more thorough cleaning
lots of black stuff in the drainage part

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: small but clean and friendly
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: the room was a little on the small side but very clean.  it had air conditioning which was a huge plus, i understand many hotels do not, in monterey and we were there when it was unusually hot. the beds were very comfortable and the room was clean. the staff we found to be very friendly, every one of them.  the free breakfast was what you would expect from a free breakfast bar not great but plenty of options and you will most likely find something you like.  we pretty much used the breakfast as a tide over until we were ready for brunch.  the location was great!  the location is really what you are paying for.  not only would i recommend to a friend, i already have.  our friends stayed at another hotel which had a larger room and was nicer looking from pictures but they were very unhappy,  to the point their room ended up being comped due to all the problems.  not to mention they spent over $40 in parking for the two days plus had to pay parking and wi-fi at the hotel.  we walked everywhere and the staff even allowed us to remain parked for a few hours, after check out. the only real downfall was the size of the room, if you plan on being in the room much, we were not.  oh and there was a little fridge, although we didn't use it, it was there :)

reasons: we were there when it was unusually hot
although we didn't use it, it was there

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great hotel near cannery row
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: i was attending a conference at the monterey plaza hotel but the block of rooms reserved was sold out by the time i registered for the conference.  i went to my expedia account and found the |MASK| inn |MASK| literally just steps away on wave st and for a room rate 40% less.  no view to speak of, at least from my room, but plenty close enough to all the attractions of that part of monterey and cannery row.  the room was fresh, clean, well appointed and welcoming.  the breakfast (included) was ok - scrambled eggs, veggie omelets, cinnamon rolls etc.  nothing gourmet but gets it done.  also good to have covered parking.

great location so we could walk to cannery room and the aquarium. the staff was friendly and helpful. the rooms were good size and comfortable. the free breakfast was excellent and they had wine a cheese at night.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: nice hotel, close to the aquarium

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: great walkable location. quiet clean rooms. and most important honest staff with amazing integrity!! one person in our group lost $150 out of her pocket without realizing it. we returned from supper and the amazing evening staff person flagged her down and returned the cash. i am awed and humbled by the character demonstrated by this act of kindness. just can’t say enough good things! we have stayed here several times and it’s always a great experience.

cons: it is very loud in the room. the walls/windows are thin so we heard every car passing below (was on the 2nd floor) as if the window was wide open. woke up multiple times at night and in the morning. easy to hear upstairs and next door neighbors. also noticed the door to the room is not flushed against the frame- you can see a little space and light peaking through. important to know that there are a few steps you have to walk up/down to get to certain rooms.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great location!
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: first off i would like to say, the hotel staff or very friendly!my family and i stayed there for 2 nights and the first day we arrived we went straight to the aquarium at about 11:00 am because hotel check in wasn't until 3:00 pm so after the 4 hour visit we arrived at our hotel to check in and the hotel employee explained to us that we could have checked in early and saved on a purchase of 2 day aquarium tickets for the price of 1 and the hotel offers free parking so that would have saved us $15.00.what a steal...oh well next time we know. i'm writing this review because i want people to know what i didn't and so you can get a good deal:) also have to say that the hotel offers free breakfast. i thought it was just going to be cereal and fruit but it was the works, pancakes,eggs,bacon,oatmeal.toast,bagels,muffins,fruit,raisin bread,yogurt,juice,milk,coffee...it was pretty good for being free can't complain!

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: my family and i loved staying here. it's in close walking distance to cannery row and the ocean. i especially loved that it was right next door to an awesome antique mall. they have underground free parking for guests. the room is clean and updated. the only frown is on the feeling of the carpet on my bare feet. it was like i can feel a film from them shampooing the carpet and a slight odor from when it was once damp. i was able to get over that though because overall the rest of the room and especually the bathrooms were so clean. it looked like it was newly built. now the best part was the free hot breakfast. it was such a pleasant experience.  they opened up a whole area with omelettes, yogurt, fruit, coffee, orange juice, cereal and even a pancake making machine. the machine had a few hiccups when trying to work but the staff was so helpful to get it back up and running. anyway, it was a nice communal area where all of the hotel guests were able to exchange smiles, conversations and excitement to start their day. i would definitely stay here again.
