fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: my wife, granddaughter and i had a wonderful three day stay at the |MASK| inn |MASK| on cannery row.  we were able to park our car in the ultra safe underground parking structure and walk everywhere.  the room was clean and very comfortable.  there was a real attention to details.  example: we loved having the choice of firm or soft pillows.  we started the day with an excellent breakfast with choice of omelets, bagels, breads and cinnamon buns.  juices, fruits and of course coffee and teas.  coffee and tea was available throughout the day.   later in the day after returning from the amazing experiences of whale watching and visits to the monterrey aquarium we had cheeses, crackers and wines available.  the staff was friendly and helpful.  and the flowering grounds beautifully calming and pleasing.  a great stay!

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: we used to stay at this hotel all the time and have paid a lot of money in the past because we always had a great experience. this time was not that. upon arriving to our room, there were stains on the floor, mold in the shower and worst of all, the sheets did not look clean. i pulled the sheets back and there was hair in the sheets, black stains on them and they were wrinkled like they had been slept in and shoved down and then just pulled back up again. they weren’t fresh and i knew it. i have never complained at a hotel before. when my husband called down to have them change the sheets he was told that they didn’t have anyone to change them and that they would have to call someone in. we told them to just bring a clean set of linens and we would do it ourselves. instead of agreeing they got defensive and said there was no way the sheets weren’t clean and made my husband feel stupid for even asking. they never brought up sheets and even when they cleaned our room the next day the sheets weren’t changed. we would have left if my kids weren’t with us and we could be sure we could get a room somewhere else and get our money back. we will never return to this location.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text:
great location and solid stay overall, but with a few key things to know. the hotel is steps from the walking/biking trail, beach, monterey bay aquarium, cannery row, and tons of restaurants and shops. we felt safe walking around at night—even our 21-year-old son walking alone. free parking is a plus, and the complimentary breakfast was a great way to start the day and save a little money.

juan, the manager, was absolutely wonderful—kind, helpful, and responsive. he really made a difference in our stay.

however, be very cautious if you're driving a vehicle with any added height. the parking garage has a very low clearance (6'6"), and the warning sign blends into the building and is hard to read. although the sign says "no pickups, vans, or campers," our suv with a yakima rack hit overhead pipes, causing damage. we got stuck and had to back out—causing even more damage. when we told the front desk, they were dismissive and unapologetic, which was frustrating. thankfully, juan later handled the situation with professionalism and kindness.

also worth noting: rooms don’t have blackout curtains, so expect to wake up when the sun rises.

if location and walkability are your priorities, this place delivers. just double-check your vehicle height before pulling into the garage!

reasons: great way to start the day and save a little money

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: the room was big enough for all 5 people.  very clean and comfortable bed. breakfast was great! very satisfying.

the room was comfortable and well maintained and clean. the staff was courteous. the breakfast was ok, but not special and the wine and cheese in the afternoon was well, less than stellar with cheap wine and plain cheese cut in squares. but i am not complaining too much about that.

great place to stay. location, very clean rooms, awesome hot breakfast, beds were so comfortable, easy parking made it an awesome stay. thank you

great location between cannery row and fisherman's wharf. very thin walls/ceilings, so you can hear pretty much everything from your neighbors and any loud noises from the street nearby. clean but outdated rooms, though the lobby is modern and seems recently updated. staff is great and the complimentary breakfast is nice to have. parking is a huge plus and the staff was generous enough to let us leave our car in the garage for as long as we needed after we had checked out in the morning.

reasons: complimentary breakfast is nice to have

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: for the price, it's great. hot breakfast had plenty of choices. their automatic pancake maker was a hit with my teenagers. when they ran out of bacon and we asked for more, they made more. the wine and cheese afternoon treat was great as well. it was walkable to restaurants and the cannery and the walkway to go down by the water. even on a weeknight there were more than a few people walking/jogging/biking the path. we would definitely stay here when we come back.

reasons: hot breakfast had plenty of choices
automatic pancake maker was a hit with my teenagers

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: we stayed a very short time overnight. it was pretty much what we were looking for. closet to where we wanted, king size bed, good a/c, clean, good area. the only thing i might even say could’ve been better was that the bathroom was a little small. but like i said, we were only there for about 12 hours overnight so it was good.

terrible! room was dirty, had to wait 20 minutes to get toilet paper, blood stain on the floor, pillows tiny and only one per person. pool was dirty and the smoking area just outside so it smelled of smoke. oh, and housekeeping knocked on the door at 8:30am! just terrible!
for what it cost, we thought it was very nice, the breakfast was more than we expected.
we got a suit and there was dog hair on our floor and in our bed.  obviously not cleaned.

paint was falling from the ceiling above the pool. ac was not working in pool room. bathrooms were out of order and disgusting. floors and bathroom were dirty. we found old food on the floor of our room. mold in areas of the hotel. trash cans around the  hotel stayed full for two days

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: this hotel is immediately off an exit for highway i-75, so was very noisy during the day and night.  loud vehicles, sirens, etc.  as such, there was also a lot of traffic and to go back and forth to restaurants and shopping involved many u-turns.  some of the staff was friendly and helpful but others sort of ignored us when we would stop by the front desk for something.  at check-out we were told they could not give us a receipt (?)  they could not give us a do not disturb sign and the wi-fi didn't work in the evenings. the bathroom in our room was in need of some serious repair work.  the breakfast buffet was good and the attendant there was nice.  i would not stay at this hotel again.

reasons: some of the staff was friendly and helpful
others sort of ignored us when we would stop by the front desk for something
at check-out we were told they could not give us a receipt
the wi-fi didn't work in the evenings

my husband called to make a reservation the day before and was told they would have a room for us facing away from the expressway because this is where most of the noise occurs. 
   when we arrived at noon the next day, we were told they did not have a room for us and they did not know when they would have one available, as this was the weekend the hotels were booked because there were two football games this weekend.  after much frustration, i stood my ground, saying we drove all the way from ft. lauderdale and did not know where to go.  we were finally given a room, but it was on the same side as the expressway.
     also, if you miss access to the only entrance, you have to make a u-turn, go under the expressway, and turn around again.  very inconvenient, especially with all the traffic that weekend.

reasons: they did not have a room for us
did not know when they would have one available

our recent stay at the |MASK| inn in ocala, fl was not worth the price that i paid.  i reserved a 1 king bed with sofa bed and we checked into the hotel on june 24th.  the air conditioner in room #404 did not work properly, so we were moved to another room of the same type.  when we walked in to room #304, we were met with a very strong unpleasant odor that smelled like stale cigarette smoke.  fortunately i had some air freshener.  the air conditioner worked though!  the rooms are not soundproofed and our room (#304) faced i-75, so i didn't sleep well at all.  so once again, we moved to room #209 (which was not the same room type) but it did not face the highway.  i rested well that night.  the next morning i noticed a stain on the bed sheet.  a budget hotel does not have to sacrifice quality.  i know this because we stayed at a comfort inn immediately prior to our stay at the |MASK| inn.  if you are a light sleeper, be sure to request a room that does not face i-75 and take earplugs as a back up.  i wish that i could have written a better review, but in this case it's impossible.

reasons: the air conditioner in room #404 did not work properly
a very strong unpleasant odor that smelled like stale cigarette smoke

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: i was a senior lady traveling alone. i stayed one night in what was supposed to be an accessible suite. the room itself was very nice but the bathroom was a big disappointment. it was large enough but very poorly designed and not particularly safe for anyone. the door opened inward and covered access to the tub. when the door was open it not only covered the tub it came right up to the commode. it also barely missed the edge of the sink when closing. in order to close the door after entering you had to edge around the commode. therefore, if you were using a walker or chair you were out of luck to take a shower in the tub.also the entire bathroom had only one grab bar and that was on the far side of the tub very low and unsafe for anyone.any seniors or handicapped folks should probably look for other accommodations.

reasons: door opened inward and covered access to the tub

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: reservation confirmed and paid to expedia. upon check in i was informed that no rooms were available.

front desk person was nice and the lobby looks really chic and cozy but the hallways and the room had a weird smell like cigarettes and humidity mixed in. once inside the room, which was a non-smoking room, it smelled the same way and i guess at some point they tried covering it up and had a super strong cleaning product smell, one of the locks on the door wasn’t broken, bathroom needs major upgrades, mini fridge didn’t work and walls are so thin you can literally listen to peoples conversation, at some point i actually thought they were trying to open my door but then realized they were just hanging outside on the hallway i guess... water bottles in the vending machines are $3 (if you want cold water) or front desk offers room temperature ones but ice machines don’t work... only one elevator, and as soon as you walk out there’s a trash can that hasn’t been emptied in days i assume because they were bags with trash and food even outside of it. ac worked ok and bed was clean and comfortable and we were exhausted from a long drive so we just fell asleep quick. i cant  comment on the free breakfast because i was dying to get out of the place. i guess you get what you pay for, it wasn’t horrible but for a few dollars more you can stay in a nicer  place. but for the record, i‘ve stayed in at other  |MASK| inns before and they’re usually pretty good.

reasons: water bottles in the vending machines are $3

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: i got to the hotel at 2pm where i was abruptly told check in isn't until 3.  i don't even think she lifted her head to look at me.  once i checked in later, the room was horrible.  there were clumps of dust all around the room. there was a used pillow behind a chair, one of our "clean" pillows had black stuff all over the case, vent above the tub was disgusting and was blackish due to the amount of dirt and dust, large hole in the ceiling that was just painted over (6-8"), the jetted tub still had a spot of thick soap residue on the edge and i wiped the tub out with lysol wipes and they definitely didn't even try to wipe it down.  the countertop was dirty and still had a sticker stuck to it from the previous people.  our comforter was ridiculous. i can't believe they kept it on the bed.  it looked as though it was stuffed with filler in various spots. lumpy would be an understatement.  i had to call down front to request a couple new pillows since ours were dirty, the young lady said i'd have to get them because she's by herself and no one can bring them to me.   let me note, this was not a $100 room, but a $225 per night room.  i've had a lot better from a $75 room.  i highly do not recommend and i'm sure i won't get a penny back for this horrible experience.

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text:
the hotel was clean, but falling apart. no maid service, ice machine broken, and wi-go was unusable. the free hot breakfast was horrible.
no towels at the pool and when i went to the front desk to ask for some, the large 50  year old woman with stringy, blonde, curly hair (staff doesn’t wear name tags) walked away from the desk without acknowledging me after i’d been waiting 10 minutes for her to check someone in. she filed, she looked for a pen, she talked to her buddy (tall man with longish gray hair) and eventually sauntered over to “help me”. “yes i need some pool towels, please” 
“yeah, i’ll get them in a minute.”
“ummm, when? we’re getting out of the pool now”
“in just a minute!”
the epic conclusion commensed when we watched the front desk and housekeeping staff get into a near brawl in the parking lot with a furious female customer in town for a funeral. the tall gray haired front desk agent was screaming in the customer’s face while the large blonde stringy haired woman continued to taunt the customer escalating the situation. 
y’all need to get your act together or find another job.

i called the hotel to book one room for one night. was quoted a price from the hotel much higher than was on expedia. clerk advised to book through expedia to get the lower rate. i asked clerk to cancel my reservation that i just made and told  her i would book through expedia as suggested.  upon arrival to the hotel, there were two reservations in my name. the one i booked through expedia and the one they were supposed to cancel.  of course the person i saw when i checked in had no knowledge of my phone call because the person who took the reservation an hour earlier was off. the error was quickly corrected and  the clerk provided excellent customer service. it was 11 o’clock at night when i got there so i went right to bed. the next morning when i got up to take a shower i noticed a third of the ceiling over the tub was heavily water damaged with paint peeling off of it and there was mold around the bathtub where the wall tile  meets the tub. also, over by the window where the floor ac unit is located some of the paint wax peeling from moisture coming from somewhere. that perhaps explained the musty mildewy smell in the room. long story short, i would definitely not recommend this hotel to anyone or stay here again until all repairs have been made. on a positive note. the hotel breakfast was good.they did follow the guidelines for allowonly eight people in the dining area at a time and a hotel staff person served you breakfast.

reasons: some of the paint was peeling from moisture coming from somewhere

well i really like the room. it obviously been well cleaned it was very comfortable and up-to-date, i was very concerned that they weren’t enforcing mandatory mask wearing of the gas in public areas. 

i take the covid-19 threat very seriously and was, quite frankly, dumbfounded by the general lack of concern from my observations in florida as compared to my home state of south carolina at a time that florida was experiencing one on the worst outbreaks and a rise in cases for the entire world. in fact, as i was checking out i saw a crowded room of people getting breakfast in a windowless room (rather than outdoors) with none of the guests apparently wearing mask, including some of the staff.

i left and placed an online at a nearby starbucks rather than risk what i saw as a very dangerous situation to receive a complementary breakfast.

granted, i have a higher risk because i’m over 60 and i am a cancer survivor, but i saw what i consider to be recklessness regarding the public spaces in a time of a pandemic.

reasons: crowded room of people getting breakfast in a windowless room
none of the guests apparently wearing mask
some of the staff not wearing masks
considered to be recklessness regarding the public spaces

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: the property was located in a very convenient area right off of i-75 and close to restaurants and shopping, the parking lot was very small and congested. the room needed updating but was very clean and reasonably priced.

i tried calling twice  (between 6-7pm) to let them know we would be coming in a little late.  unfortunately no one answered.  not a good sign. in the room the chair had a rip in it, the sheets looked  slept in and the drawers in the bedroom chest and tv unit were open. the linens(bath and bed) looked old.  while the bath vanity had been updated the shower was ancient. this place needs an overhaul. won’t be back.

reasons: drawers in the bedroom chest and tv unit were open
chair had a rip in it

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: i loved the suite we upgraded to with the jetted tub in the room. my husband and i stayed there the night of our wedding and it was perfect! the room was huge with a nice bathroom. the hot tub was also huge (definitely big enough for the 2 of us) and it was so relaxing after a long day of being on our feet. they mentioned that if they knew it was our wedding night they would've put rose petals in our room and prepared the bath for us with petals to (so newly weds this is your chance)! the only complaint i have about the hotel was the elevator... it was extremely slow! i thought it was broken at first because of how long we waited but another family came by and said it just takes a really long time. it took probably about 8 minutes. it's not the end of the world... it was just a little annoying because our hands were full. i would definitely recommend this hotel though and we would for sure return in the future.

reasons: it was just a little annoying because our hands were full

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: the ice maker is broken, the microwave in my room is broken, the heat doesn’t work, i am sleeping with 2 blankets the hotel provided and 1i brought at the target in town.

reasons: the microwave in my room is broken

only concerns,. 
not enough parking

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: it was in a good location. cons was the hotel booked a party at same time and lobby and outside had tons of people. also in my room i found 2 small roaches. sat mirning lady in front of vending machine was high as a kite in front of my children.

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: upon walking in the room it was as hot and muggy as it was outside. there was no staff at the front desk to greet and assist us. in the room the mini fridge also didn’t work so i couldn’t even have cold water to drink and the bottom of the tub was disgusting and black. the sheets felt sticky and looked as if they made the bed from the last guests those for sure were not clean sheets, to help with the room being so hot i had to ask for a plug in fan. asked for another room they said it was completely booked so we had no choice but to stay since i already paid, they withdrew a $100.00 pre auth charge incase of damage and we live 2 hours away. i spoke to carolyn at the front desk who was so rude as well as racist. she was yelling at her associate savannah and treating her like absolute garbage as well as the maids who ever the only pleasant portion of this experience. carolyn was very unprofessional. i was asking her how i can be compensated for such a horrible experience she shrugged her shoulders and said there’s nothing she can do. i left and decided to call expedia and see what can be done since the hotel didn’t want to take responsibility for their actions. the rep from expedia advised she was going to call the property, once she got back on the line with me she advised the manager told her i was lying about everything i said, then i decided to contact the manager of the hotel and ask why she would do such a thing. horrible experience.

good pool beds are pretty comfy they keep it clean only thing that sort of sucked was the lighting from the building shined in through the curtains so it wasnt as dark as id prefer while sleeping almost like i had a night light on but eventually i fell asleep and it was dark lol

we spent 3 nights at this hotel they refused to give us an extra towel so we hung up our towels hoping to get 2 more and they took them and replaced them but not anything else they didn’t make the bed. i called the front desk 3 times because we had no hair dryer no one answered the phone come to find out when we went downstairs for breakfast the front desk staff was busy talking to the kitchen staff instead of being in the office. when we finished breakfast which was mediocre we asked about getting a hair dryer she said i’ll try but couldn’t promise. asked cleaning staff when we went back to our room and was told they didn’t have any. asked if we could get one from an empty room and was told no.

this is my 4th time staying there. i'll never stay there again or suggest anyone else to stay there. we had to ask for toilet paper, coffee, and tissue on numerous occasions. the bathroom was small. no shelving for personal items. we had to go out and buy a tv table to put our person bathroom items on. the closet was so small and all of our clothes were partly on the floor. the mirrors on the jacuzzi was never cleaned.
we used candles in the bathroom and jacuzzi and was told on the last day it was illegal. why didn't they tell us on day 1. i got socked with a 504.28 bill and told it was cheaper than calling the fire department. never again.

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: the absolute worst hotel my wife and i have ever stayed in.  cannot believe |MASK| inn put their name on this dilapidated building. the staff was not friendly, elevator took forever and they only have one. noise outside our room. the blinds didn’t open they were attached together, mold in the ice maker.  the bathroom was an afterthought, so small. seedy people outside the hotel at night. when we came back from dinner seemed as though we were seeing multiple drug transactions. we would be idiots to eat their free breakfast.  a cheap motel on the side of the road would have been cleaner and safer! |MASK| inn should be ashamed!

wifi was limited to non existent on their unsecured network. caulking around tub was old and cracked. there were rust stains on the shower walls, damaged floor tiles and a toilet tank cover that was the wrong size for the tank. hotel’s location is on a very busy/noisy street and 200 feet from interstate 75.

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: car issues on the way home from orlando.  luckily in ocala the town is large enough to find a place to stay while car in shop and close to restaurants, stores and lyft and uber are quickly available.  the hotel had a good price with one of the lower pet fees and allowed us a late checkout since car would not be ready until around 1:00pm.  it is a little dated but staff was very friendly and met our needs for an overnight stay.  you are right of i-75 so can be a little noisy but it did not bother us and it has a small indoor pool and breakfast.

this is without doubt the dirtiest hotel i have ever stayed in. there is not one part of this hotel that is clean. i have given a couple of chances for the staff to correct the issues, but they do not care. the location is horrible. traffic noise all day and all night. kids running up and down the hall at all times. guest sitting in the hall on their phones at all hours. stains everywhere. needed wifi for work, wifi never works. stay as far away from this hotel as possible. checking out early and finding somewhere else.

trust me, the room looks bigger in the pictures then for real.  nothing big.  you get what you pay for.  my husband had to finish some work when we discovered that the internet for the whole hotel was out and had been out all week.  we were not informed and when asked the person was pretty unsympathetic.  sleep was a big problem.  i have never slept in a harder bed.  the pillows were tiny and did little for comfort.  the worst part was the road noise.  it was loud and never let up.  
lastly, in a pandemic i assume that when the sign says sanitized means it's at least clean.  the shower had mold and scum running down the wall.  i was able to rub a washcloth over it and it was removed.  so, not hard to clean = should have been clean.  i was not happy but we had a rough night of sleep and a early appointment so we did not say anything.  overall i was really unhappy with my choice.

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: susan and grace were excellent and had superior customer service. susan went above and beyond the call of duty assisting us with our handicap accessible room. marcie was great with assisting us at breakfast. she greeted us daily with a smile and recognized us. she was great!  susan should be recognized for her superior customer service skills. she is truly a valuable asset to your organization.

susan went above and beyond the call of duty assisting us with our handicap accessible room

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text:
you could not ask for better front-end staff.  check-in and checkout were handled very effectively with no hassle and in a friendly customer-oriented fashion.

the hotel itself is a different story.  it has limited parking and the parking lot is poorly designed making getting in and out a hassle.  you must enter through a shared entrance with the gas station next door and the vehicles fueling up sometimes impede your path. leaving the parking lot requires that you exit through the gas station's parking area / fueling area.  did i mention,  that there is limited parking????  yep, if you get there and are able to get a parking space, you better stay parked because if you don't and you leave, you might not find a parking place.  

the rooms look okay, as they reflect a fairly decent decorator's touch, however, the air conditioning units are under the window units and they do not put out enough to cool the room.  the rooms are not sound-proof and the hallway noise is at times unbearable with screaming kids, slamming doors, loud talking, and other associated distractions.  the air conditioning units in the hallway was not functioning and the hallway was hot!!!  there are not any functioning ice machines on any of the floors.  there is only one slow moving elevator in the building and you can see your life tick away standing there waiting for the elevator.  the hallway carpeting is showing signs of wear and tear and it definitely needs to be replaced in the very near future.

reasons: do not put out enough to cool the room
hallway noise is at times unbearable
air conditioning units in the hallway was not functioning
you can see your life tick away standing there waiting for the elevator
handled very effectively with no hassle
vehicles fueling up sometimes impede your path
if you leave, you might not find a parking place

reasons: the vending machines were not working

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: my husband, 2 children (ages 3 & 5) and i decided to stay at |MASK| |MASK| over the memorial day weekend. when we arrived i was told that we had been upgraded to a larger room with a full kitchen, living room, and dining area. we were extremely pleased with the room. my kids loved the large pool - so much so that we swam until 9 p.m. every night! this is a reasonable hotel right on the beach with a little playground nearby. also it is safe for kids since you can walk over one block and there is no driving allowed on the beach. nice, friendly staff and overall a great family trip!

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: clean, older beachfront hotel.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text:
this hotel is just what they advertise. it is a small,older complex but very quiet and well kept. it is located directly on the beach. we had a standard room with 2 double beds, a small microwave and mini fridge. we did get a look at the the full kitchen suite and for a little more would suggest that if you want to prepare meals other than just sandwhiches and microwave meals. pool was large. nice size kiddie pool. both very clean. this is a good time of year to visit the beach. still warm, enough sun and not crowded. the room did have a mildewy smell, but once the a/c was running and a little air freshner it was fine.
if you want to spend your money on things other than a fancy room, this is the place.

reasons: once the a/c was running and a little air freshner it was fine

|MASK| |MASK| is currently under major construction. aside from windows being blocked with biz clean plastic, shower heads falling off hitting my son in the head and leaky faucets. i rented one of my rooms with a kitchen to cook a 25th anniversary dinner and the oven did not work! it is a charming place and would definitely come back after construction is done.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: spacious, nice room amenities, oceanview
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: i'm an artist and booked this hotel while i was in town for the images art show in downtown. the hotel was accommodating to my minivan and trailer for parking. the room was spacious and divided into a bedroom and living room with a tv in both rooms. the kitchen had a full size refridge, mini stove and microwave along with dishes and silverware and dishwasher. the room was clean, smelled fresh and the two double beds were very comfortable. i would definitely book this hotel again for business and for pleasure. the price of the room per night was very reasonable compared to other hotels and for what it included.

reasons: accommodating to my minivan and trailer for parking
full size refridge, mini stove and microwave along with dishes and silverware and dishwasher
accommodating to my minivan and trailer for parking

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: oceanfront
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: i asked for oceanfront room overlooked pool and then view of ocean. i suppose i should of asked for direct ocean front. was very loud at night unruly guests-unfortunate. staff and room were nice got in early. great location. very pricey for accomadations. not enough parking spaces!

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: nothing fancy but nice
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: small room, very clean! right on the water. it was great for us!
we had a great time the location was perfect. we could see the ocean from our deck and the beach was just a few steps away. we will stay there again.

reasons: we could see the ocean from our deck
the beach was just a few steps away

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: felt like home...
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: we enjoyed a very pleasant, very relaxing weekend. the unit was very clean, very accomodating, the kitchen was well equipped. the unit was so cute!

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: |MASK| |MASK| review.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: hotel location was great for access to the beach. size of room was a little small. staff kept room clean each day. would go back and stay there again.

reasons: staff kept room clean each day
hotel location was great for access to the beach

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: old rundown on the beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: old rundown on the beach  as soon as we drove up to the hotel we knew it was the wrong place no elevator finally got to our room smelled like mildew nasty dirty coffee pot and totally on sanitary wouldn't recommend that with a friend and a dog

reasons: as soon as we drove up to the hotel we knew it was the wrong place

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: nice little hotel on the ocean
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: only stayed one night, but it was a good night. hotel staff was great. view is amazing!
it was a pleasant place to stay! having a small kitchen with basic cooking supplies was amazing! super clean and beautiful.

reasons: having a small kitchen with basic cooking supplies was amazing

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: proximity to the beach is its greatest asset!
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: booked a room with 2dbl beds but was provided one with a king size and a pull-out sofa. we arrived late and were tired so decided to try it....had to spend a miserable night on decrepit sofa (spring were worn and mattress was falling through frame). could not find anyone from front desk to ask to change room. our phone did not ring into the front desk (gave a busy signal) and the office was locked up when we went looking for someone to complain about discomfort. our second night (saturday) we were told they were full to capacity so we resigned to stay. around 11pm or so we were sitting talking near the kitchen area when we saw a palmetto bug (roach) crawl from or near the toaster and scurry across the wall to disappear down behind the stove... the guy was kind enough to spray around the area and left us the can of roach spray but needless to say it was an uneasy night!

reasons: saw a palmetto bug (roach) crawl from or near the toaster
could not find anyone from front desk to ask to change room
our phone did not ring into the front desk (gave a busy signal)
the office was locked up when we went looking for someone to complain about discomfort

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: property was smaller (narrower) than expected. unfortunately for us there was a large group that monopolized almost all available space in the common area and most of the parking. bad luck weekend, but no big deal really.

reasons: monopolized almost all available space in the common area

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: great location, needs maintenance.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: right on the beach, but the building and the unit both are showing their age with pealing paint, worn rugs, etc. beds were not very comfortable. but for the price it was a fair deal. you get what you pay for.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: friendly staff
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: the staff are very friendly the hotel was clean in all areas and the price are flexible i would recommend.

reasons: the hotel was clean in all areas

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: much more spacious than i thought. very cozy. big bathroom and they have 2 fans in the bedroom. big balcony too

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: close to beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: room was small. right on rhe ocean. needs updating on facilities.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: nice on the beach.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: nice layout of room with pull out couch and full kitchen. ac unit was in living room so bedroom was a little warm for august. right on the beach with private gate entrance back to hotel property. nearby we had breakfast place (cj's) within 0.5 miles.

reasons: ac unit was in living room so bedroom was a little warm for august
right on the beach with private gate entrance back to hotel property

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: it’s a very moderately priced hotel right on the beach. it’s not first rate by any means, it’s a bit run down, but it was clean enough and comfortable enough and at a very decent price given its location. we needed a place to stay just one night before we could move into our condo and it worked very well. we would stay there again.

reasons: very decent price given its location

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: nice, older clean hotel
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: very nice older hotel. we had a roof leak in the bathroom one night and the next morning they moved us to a different room. also the ac wasn't working, they replaced it within an hour. the maintenance guy wasn't happy about it but had to do it anyway.

reasons: they replaced it within an hour

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: very nice budget hotel right on the beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: nice place to stay - clean, comfortable and right on the beach. we do not go on vacation to stay in a hotel room, so fancy amenities are wasted on us. clean and comfortable are what we look for - and good price and excellent location mean that we will return!
very clean the beds were very comfortable! excellent location right on the beach.  view of the beach from our room.

reasons: excellent location right on the beach
view of the beach from our room

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: just an average accommodation...small and old room
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: room was bleak, and showed signs of wear but was liveable. older micro and refrigerator,but handy. problem with coffee plugin.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: right on the beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: the hotel is right on the beach. you can hear the ocean, there is a nice little bar/restaurant you can walk to. the rooms are powder puffed new bedding but the shower was nasty. the price is right for the hotel though, the pool seemed nice though to chilly when we were there. should take down the fence it blocks the views for the ground floor rooms, or have a chain link that you can see through.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: great location
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: nice warm water pool and wonderful beach nice people

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: great beach hotel for everyone!
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: beautiful setting and well cared for hotel. pool was wonderful and front desk helpful.

the property is on the beach with access to beach. rooms was clean, prepared and spacious with more than enough room for one or two people. the room had small kitchenette with refrigerator and stove and adequate cooking utensils. there has not been much renovation, but if that keeps the costs down, ok with me. the staff were friendly and helpful. i had a balcony with good view of beach and ocean. 
no elevators with only exterior stairs was major difficulty. anyone with disabilities or difficulty lifting suitcases wouldn't be able to stay. if inclement weather or high heat, that would compound the problem. that is the biggest negative for this place. also, front office is not open during the night.
i would stay again and was very satisfied with accommodations.

reasons: small kitchenette with refrigerator and stove and adequate cooking utensils
I had a balcony with good view of beach and ocean
no elevators with only exterior stairs was major difficulty
anyone with disabilities or difficulty lifting suitcases wouldn't be able to stay
if inclement weather or high heat, that would compound the problem
small kitchenette with refrigerator and stove and adequate cooking utensils
front office is not open during the night
the property is on the beach with access to beach

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: small condos on the beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text:
this "hotel" is actually a set of small condos on the ocean.  the designation is needed because you do not get the services common for a hotel. "maid" services consist of clean towels and a fresh coffee packet each day.  the most disappointing part of my stay was the fact that i reserved two suites, each with a pair of double beds.  trouble is they don't have condos with two double beds - yet expedia sold me that configuration.

lesson is it always pays to call the hotel to be sure what you think you have reserved matches what you actually reserved.

reasons: maid services consist of clean towels and a fresh coffee packet each day
they don't have condos with two double beds

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: perfect hotel!
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: nice hotel right on the beach. watched the sun rise one morning from my hotel room. the pool was the perfect temperature! we would go back!

reasons: watched the sun rise one morning from my hotel room

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: nice basic place to stay.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: |MASK| |MASK| was a very nice place to stay. i had little interaction with the staff but what contact i did have was very good. i arrived late (after the front desk had closed) and called the night manager number and was checked in within minutes. staff members from cleaning crew and others all greeted me each day and all seemed to just enjoy what they did. have to say, pool was the cleanest pool i have seen in a while at a public place. rooms were basic but clean. lodge is a bit away from the business area of the beach but, you do have great beach access and i discovered some great walking trails off a side street within walking distance. overall, a nice place to stay providing value for the dollar.

reasons: the cleanest pool i have seen in a while at a public place

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: be careful - no elevators!
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: there were only two negatives about this hotel: there is no elevator (and both my husband and mother had a very difficult time using the stairs every time), and the bedroom did not have an a/c vent so that room was about 8+/- degrees warmer than the main outer room.

reasons: the bedroom did not have an a/c vent
room was about 8+/- degrees warmer than the main outer room

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: older but clean. right on the ocean.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: the room was good size but bathroom was very small. we had a few issues with the water temp and getting the air conditioning set properly. the view and location is great.

reasons: getting the air conditioning set properly

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: right on the beach.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: have stayed at this hotel many times. older hotel but always clean. very nice pool. quick and easy access to beach.

reasons: quick and easy access to beach

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: on the beach at reasonable rates
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: this small, 3 story motel is right on one of florida's best east coast beaches in one of florida's best beach towns.  though it is dated and in need of some updates it is very clean and the beds were very comfortable to sleep in.  the rooms are very small unless you rent an efficiency and the bathrooms even smaller.  but unless you plan to spend much time in your room who cares, what matters is cleanliness, comfort and everything in good working order.  the pool is clean and well maintained (not heated).  there is even a kiddie pool. there are several gas grills for customers to use.  the staff is very helpful.  i will stay here again.

reasons: several gas grills for customers to use
there is even a kiddie pool

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: fun at the beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text:
the hotel is older, but being right on the beach and the price were hard to beat.
we would stay there again.

reasons: the price were hard to beat

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: ok hotel with walking distance to beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: the only great thing this place has going for them is that it's super close to the beach. the staff was ok. it was very clean however you can really tell that this was a motel turned into an inn/hotel. it felt dinghy, it smelled old, and the tv was extremely small..like 23" whaaatttt!! if you're just wanting to crash for the night, it's not bad...if you're going to make a weekend out of it, go somewhere else

reasons: it's super close to the beach

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: great location close to the beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: my daughter, son, his wife and 2 kids had a nice time. the pool is nice. the beach was fun.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: great location
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: great location, close to shops and restaurants. directly on the beach.
dried up washcloth in shower. bed looked like it was just slept in

reasons: bed looked like it was just slept in

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: beach and pool were great. suite was comfortable and nice.
obviously being on the ocean is unbeatable. the outside of the property is in nice good looking condition. the room was a bit dated and the bathroom needs to be remodeled but overall was ok.

reasons: obviously being on the ocean is unbeatable
the outside of the property is in nice good looking condition

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: good location, that's all !
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: condition of exterior is disgusting. room was clean and pool was clean. in real need of renovation. great location, lots of beach. a/c was not sufficient for entire unit....bedroom and bathroom stayed warm.

reasons: a/c was not sufficient for entire unit

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: great beach motel
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: clean and spacious with a lot of amenities. great beach access. the only reason i gave it 4/5 instead of a 5, was because the blinds in windows and sliding doors had missing panels. anyone who walked by could see into our room. everything else was great! very good value.
beautiful beach out front, vehicle access to beach, close to goods and services.  staff was friendly and responsive.

what disturbed me was the poor lighting  around the staircases.  the night of arrival we had difficulty finding our way in the dark.

enjoyed the unit very much.  found the women cleaning each day especially friendly.

reasons: women cleaning each day especially friendly

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: welcoming front desk
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: when we arrived we were greeted pleasantly and was able to check in right away. that was a plus. we got a room by the pool which was very noisy on friday evening.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: great location
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: pleasant and convenient. great location on the beach

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: quaint great a hotel room used for sleeping.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: first, the bottom floor of the hotel is about 60 years old, but as you go up in floors the younger they are. i have to say only reason i did not give 5 stars is the size of the room. the hotel is centaly located on atlantic ave, and is right on the beach. the room size would be better if they would hang the flat screen on the wall and remove or move the dresser to the closet area to make room to walk then make the smaller rooms i bed only then they would rate five stars also as it is an older hotel room it is musky but not so bad you need a new room. i am an actual floridian, and this hotel reminded me of going to the keys for lobster season or fishing when i was a kid in the 80's. staff great, hotel again you use them to sleep in, it is not marriott or any of the high end hotels so if you have to have a latte or want free free free crap then do not bother this is an economic hotel that works for a family wanting a quick trip to the beach or for a fun get away, all other need not apply. we will stay here again and again.

reasons: reminded me of going to the keys for lobster season or fishing when I was a kid in the 80's

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: under construction without notice
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: blocked in to pool area from suite over night, no discount, poor furniture, roaches.

reasons: blocked in to pool area from suite over night

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: hotel has stay was good.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text:
i reserved a room with 2 beds. i arrived at 1:30 friday for reservation. waited for room for 1 1/2 hours . check in is 3:00 . i was told they were full but have a different room . it had one bed no pull out bed.
3 flights up carried everything to find this out. now carry everything back down. she had one room open, it had only one bed and pull out couch that was not at all sturdy . i was told when you book with someone else you do not always get what you reserve. i do not think reserving a room paying up-front should eliminate you from getting what you expected and paid for. 
please contact me and let me know about this.
thank you

reasons: told they were full but have a different room
not always get what you reserve
paying up-front should eliminate you from getting what you expected

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: clean, comfy, safe
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: it was a pleasant stay. the staff was extremely nice and the room was cleaned daily. the bed could have been more comfortable. i did enjoy the facility and i felt very safe..
stay was ok  rooms were nice  pool was nice and  clean

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: great location on the beach but a mediocre hotel.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: very old building. old school keys as well, no key cards. minimal parking - most of which is in the sand. ramp to the beach was overgrown with sharp sand burrs. gate into the pool area is broken. shower and hose located inside pool area, not a practical location where it should be at entry to the beach. bathroom was spacious but the vanity stood on metal bars with no storage underneath. odd smell inside room and window/sliding door blinds are broken. furniture is like used office furniture. i chose to stay here only because i got a late start and availability on the beach was extremely limited. i definitely would not stay here again.

reasons: gate into the pool area is broken
shower and hose located inside pool area, not a practical location

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: nice beach front motel.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: very clean and comfortable. very close to no drive beach. staff was accommodating.

reasons: very close to no drive beach

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: on the beach, next to no drive beach, but still close to town

this was the worst stay i've ever experienced with expedia. i do not recommend this place are comforter, sheets and bed covered in stuff all layers it was disgusting, there was no shampoo or hair dryer. there was no key pad on the door for code i was given there was only lockbox for physical key. i reported all this to contact and sent photos of everything. including this place had so much damage from what seemed like it flooded , stains on couches and everything we wanted to leave thankfully they at least had someone drop off clean sheets as at first they told us it would be morning before we could get clean bedding so we slept on top of those

reasons: comforter, sheets and bed covered in stuff
so much damage from what seemed like it flooded
they at least had someone drop off clean sheets
told us it would be morning before we could get clean bedding

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: i wish i could upload the pictures i took. the furniture was stained and gross. the place smelled of mold. what was really upsetting was the pictures online were beautiful. once i walked in the kitchen was a dump. the bathroom was gross. i immediately tried to speak with somebody. i was only able to text. they did offer me another suite. i immediately declined. i just wanted to go home. i wish i could have gotten my money back. it is what it is. i know the place was super cheap for the weekend. i immediately found out way. do not waste your time and money.

the property was really run down and dirty. we had problems with our first room, and they gave us a free upgrade. it really made me want to like the place since they were trying, but even the next room was a disaster. the bathroom smelled horrible of urine, the shower curtain was yellowing, and everything was just old and not very clean. 
having a pool was nice but it was not clean, and had brown walls and floor. could use a major cleaning. it does have direct beach access which was the best part. 
would never stay here again.

reasons: direct beach access which was the best part

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: under construction
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: i booked this through expedia, so once we got there and weren't thrilled with it, we couldn't get any money back....the hotel is under renovations...every moning there was a man lift right outside our bedroom....walking out through the office we had to duck ladders...our room had recently been painted and new carpet installed, so that was nice. the staff was very friendly and helpful, especially shirley, the cleaning lady. if you want to swim in the winter, the pool is not heated, so this is not the place to come to in jan...i'd call to see if the renovations are completed before i would book this hotel. on the plus side, it is right on the ocean, and we enjoyed walking on the beach. hope this is helpful.

reasons: the staff was very friendly and helpful
this is not the place to come to in jan
it is right on the ocean
we enjoyed walking on the beach

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: stay away from this property
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text:
between terrible condition of furniture, insects crawling in bathroom and kitchen, peeling paint in unit and dirty carpeting(could not walk without shoes in room feet were black) and this was after i received an upgraded room. the first room was even worse did not receive maid service or linen exchange one day. sat on couch and could barely see outside pool and ocean, windows looked like they have not been cleaned in months.
i have stayed in many rentals during my 35 years on the road...this is by far the worst i have ever experienced. complained on checkout..but got no satisfaction.
i never ever write reviews but i had towrite one on this stay.

reasons: did not receive maid service or linen exchange one day
insects crawling in bathroom and kitchen
could barely see outside pool and ocean

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: i loved the location to the beach. it was quite easy to find.

reasons: loved the location to the beach
it was quite easy to find

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: i would wholeheartedly recommend this place to anyone and everyone. staff was very kind and helpful. breakfast and espresso were wonderful. you are literally at the entrance to pompeii. the train station is across the street. i have nothing negative to say! we were very happy!
très bien sauf à l'arrivée à l'aéroport où la navette a été oubliée
this is part of a camp ground. breakfast was adequate but not the best.
migliorare la pulizia e la qualità del materasso........

hotel very clean, day reception staff kind and friendly, night staff talk no english and were rude when we used translators to talk with them and try to book in, area around hotel all shuts at 5pm and a walk down hill to main town around 2 miles.
dirty area but good for a quick visit to pompaii.

reasons: were rude when we used translators to talk with them and try to book in

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.title: sono camere di un campeggio non un hotel
110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text:
non ha le caratteristiche di un hotel le camere sono piccole senza un armadio e fredde.
la colazione meglio non parlarne. il costo della camere vale appena 35/40 €

hat den stil einer herberge. alles ist minimalistisch. zimmer u bad sehr klein, kaum für wohlbeleibte geeignet. kein schrank- man lebt aus dem koffer.
frühstück für deutsche gewohnheiten mit tägl. selbe 2 sorten wurst, 1 art käse, nur toastbrot.
für 1- 2 nächte geeignet.

reasons: für deutsche gewohnheiten mit tägl. selbe 2 sorten wurst

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: excellent location and room. but, gutter smell in bathroom was nauseating. mold in bathroom. also the ac did not work. room remained hot. had room changed next day. here too ac fan did not work. small things but should be corrected asap.
superbe hotel avec un personnel tres agréables et tres pret des ruines de |MASK| et beaucoup de restaurants a proximité  passer un très agréable sejour

liked location and staff helpfulness
rooms could do with some sound proofing
great stay, simple but everything you needed. clean. freindly. very comfortable bed. even brought breakfast tray to the room without us asking.

reasons: even brought breakfast tray to the room without us asking

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: this property is located 50m from the pompeii scavi train station.  there are two pompeii train stations make sure you use pompeii scavi.  the hotel door is 100m from the entrance to the pompeii ruins.  it was unbelievable.  you catch the vesuvius bus from pompeii scavi.  the front desk guy spoke great english and was a huge reservoir of advice and recommendations.  he found out i like archelogy and recommended an extra visit to paestum which was one of the ten best archeology sites i have ever been too in my life.  the hotel was spotless too.

reasons: huge reservoir of advice and recommendations
recommended an extra visit to paestum

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.title: resort shuts down by 7pm
110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: |MASK| describes itself as having a restaurant but it was never open after 6pm. we had no means of getting a cup of tea or hot water to make a bed time cuppa. we asked for an early morning call which we did not get. no fault of |MASK| but the whole area of the |MASK| ruins shuts down at 7pm when the crowds go home.

reasons: we asked for an early morning call which we did not get
we had no means of getting a cup of tea or hot water

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text:
i chose to stay at hotel (camping) |MASK| at the recommendation of a friend, who has stayed there for years when working at pompeii. except for a few nights when i had to tolerate a loud neighbor, the room and grounds were quiet. the facilities were clean and in good repair, with excellent housekeeping and a staffed, friendly, and helpful front desk. i liked that the room had a mini-fridge, so i could keep some drinks, yogurt, fruit, and left-overs. the room also has a mini-safe to stash one’s travel docs and electronics.

people stay in the area for convenient access to the cirvumvesuviana and the main entrance of pompeii. unfortunately, most nearby restaurants close at 6:00 pm, so you need to stock your mini-fridge, walk into town, or up and around the corner to the few nearby restaurants for dinner.

my reservation came with breakfast every morning, which was very basic, continental: yogurt, espresso or cappuccino, cakes, croissants, ham or salami, and bread. the “juice” was really just a sweetened water drink. that said, the staff were very nice. for a more substantial breakfast, the bar/restaurant sgambati (owned by the same people?) serves omelettes, in addition to a regular menu of appetizers, salads, panini, pasta, and pizzas.

overall, i was very satisfied staying at hotel/camping |MASK| and look forward to returning.

reasons: the bar/restaurant sgambati serves omelettes, in addition to a regular menu
staffed, friendly, and helpful front desk
the facilities were clean and in good repair
the room also has a mini-safe to stash one’s travel docs and electronics

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text:
hotel is located very close th |MASK| scavi train station, very convenient for visitor to the pompeii archeological site.  

finding the hotel is very confusing. you must go into a campground and then you see the small hotel. the hotel needs to improve their signs so that hotel guest know that the hotel is there. 

the room was small but comfortable. we checked in late. our room was not ready, but housekeeping got to it reasonably quickly. 

breakfast was adequate. quality of offerings mediocre for the most part. good coffee.  one of the wait staff seemed surly... appeared to be some kind of staff conflict

reasons: quality of offerings mediocre for the most part
one of the wait staff seemed surly
housekeeping got to it reasonably quickly

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: we check in after midnight and the front desk gentleman was very helpful.

reasons: the front desk gentleman was very helpful

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text:
ottima sistemazione a due passi da uno degli ingressi agli scavi di |MASK|. 
pulito. buona colazione.

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.title: neues, genial gelegenes garni-hotel an den ruinen
110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: wer die ausgrabungen von pompeji auf dem plan hat und mit der bahn an der station pompeji scavi ankommt, hat es nicht weit zum garni hotel villa |MASK| am rande eines hübschen campingplatzes, gesäumt von orangenbäumen. supernettes personal!!!!

positiv:
das hotel ist für ausflüge mit und ohne mietwagen super zentral gelegen. man erreicht alles wichtige innerhalb kurzer zeit zu fuß:
den eingang zu pompeii innerhalb von 2 minuten, einen supermarkt innerhalb von 10 minuten, eine bahnstation liegt 1 minute entfernt.
es gibt viele fußläufig erreichbare restaurants. 
das zimmer wird jeden tag sehr gründlich gereinigt.
man bekommt jeden tag neue handtücher und neue pflegeprodukte.
die zimmer liegen mit der terrasse direkt am mit vielen orangenbäumen bepflanzten parkplatz des campingplatzes, was ich jedoch eher als positiv werten würde. man kann, wenn man einen mietwagen hat direkt "vor der tür" parken.
die zimmer sind ruhig gelegen und auch der parkplatz sowie der campingplatz sind stets ruhig.
das zimmer ist mit einer aussenjalousie ausgestattet, wodurch man es gut gegen die sonne/hitze abschirmen kann. der kühlschrank im zimmer ist zur privaten nutzung. auch die klimaanlage funktionierte bei uns einwandfrei.
die rezeption ist 24 h besetzt und das personal  dort sehr freundlich.
negativ:
das frühstück ist sehr einfach. es gibt das aller nötigste und jeden tag das selbe. 
der service im restaurant ist ausbaufähig.
der cappucino ist jedoch sehr gut :)

alles in allem waren wir sehr zufrieden und können das hotel mit bestem gewissen weiter empfehlen.

reasons: es gibt das aller nötigste und jeden tag das selbe
das zimmer wird jeden tag sehr gründlich gereinigt
man bekommt jeden tag neue handtücher und neue pflegeprodukte
die zimmer liegen mit der terrasse direkt am mit vielen orangenbäumen bepflanzten parkplatz
der service im restaurant ist ausbaufähig
man kann, wenn man einen mietwagen hat direkt 'vor der tür' parken
der parkplatz sowie der campingplatz sind stets ruhig

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: leider hatten wir zwei tage nur kaltes wasser zum duschen. das wurde dann am abend des zweiten tages behoben. das haus ist sehr hellhörig, wir hatten nachbarn, die glaubten, das haus für sich alleine zu haben. das personal im hotel ist sehr nett. die “damen” im frühstücksraum im restaurant gegenüber sind bis zur grenze der unhöflichkeit gleichgültig und nicht sehr service orientiert. insgesamt für eine bis zwei nächte für den besuch von pompeji und dem vesuv zu empfehlen, gerade auch für den preis. zum eingang von pompeji sind es ca 160 meter. zum bahnhof 100 meter.

reasons: bis zur grenze der unhöflichkeit gleichgültig
bis zur grenze der unhöflichkeit gleichgültig

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: very convenient location for both the |MASK| scavi railway station and the |MASK| ruins as well as the vesuvius bus. limited options for evening dining but there are a number of dining places about ten minutes walk down the hill. there is limited outside areas to sit. the internet in the rooms is poor but adequate if you go into the corridor near the router.

reasons: the internet in the rooms is poor
adequate if you go into the corridor near the router

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text:
visited during late august 2024.

positives: 
- inexpensive
- exceptionally convenient for a visit to pompeii. you are as close as you can be without actually being inside the ruins
- the fellow at the front desk was kind and helpful and let us store our luggage while we visited pompeii
- the hotel is clean and the tvs and bathroom fixtures work
- breakfast is available and it's fair

negatives:
- the a/c works, but it does not go low enough. you can only lower your room to a certain degree and probably out of a desire to reduce energy usage, it does not go as low as you want it to go when you are there in the blazing summer.
- mosquitoes. we were killing them left and right. i'm a magnet for them so this is a bigger problem for me than most, but boy was it annoying to keep hunting them.

reasons: does not go as low as you want it to go
breakfast is available and it's fair
the fellow at the front desk was kind and helpful
the tvs and bathroom fixtures work
let us store our luggage while we visited pompeii

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text:
pros: very convenient location,  staff were helpful and nice, room was clean, aircond worked fine.
cons: noisy - its a busy area and the walls are thin. weird lumpy beds and pillows. breakfast was v disappointing: only a few sweet pastries, cornflakes, really woeful coffee and plastic cheese. eating in the nearby restaurants was very expensive, although the food was nice there. 
overall i felt it was ok for the cost of the hotel.

this property is literally on the |MASK| ruins doorstep. the staff were helpful and the hotel was clean. breakfast is self-service in the restaurant opposite. i am gluten free and when i asked them i was well catered for.
good hotel for one night stay. very close proximity to the train station and |MASK| ruins. area appears unsafe due to shared camping grounds. lastly, wifi is only functional in the lobby area.

reasons: only functional in the lobby area

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: very very convenient location! staff is wonderful! good for people with cars or who take transport. perfect for visiting pompeii.

reasons: good for people with cars or who take transport

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: walking distance to the pompeii archaeological entrance. friendly and helpful staff, quick response time for any requests. nice complimentary continental breakfast.

the hotel was in a perfect location, right next to the ruins. breakfast croissants were delicious. the hotel staff was incredibly helpful with a tour issue and was supportive the entire stay! it was a great experience!

reasons: the hotel staff was incredibly helpful with a tour issue

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: this is a tourist hotel at the entrance of pompeii. there is also a tour company booth outside and the train station is here. you cannot get any more convenient and it was so affordable.  extremely clean. multiple cafés in walking distance. please note many of them close at six. plan accordingly.  this is all i needed to tour pompeii and mount vesuvius.

reasons: there is also a tour company booth outside
this is all I needed to tour pompeii and mount vesuvius

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: ottima posizione vicino al sito archeologico, comodo parcheggio, buona colazione non compresa nel prezzo ma con supplemento di 5 euro a persona (non è molto, considerando che è a buffet quindi si può mangiare quanto si vuole), gentilissimo il personale che, in seguito a nostra richiesta, ci ha concesso di ritardare il check-out di un paio d'ore senza costi aggiuntivi. camere non grandi e soprattutto il bagno molto piccolo, ma nel complesso il soggiorno per noi è stato piacevole. buon rapporto qualità/prezzo.

reasons: buona colazione non compresa nel prezzo ma con supplemento di 5 euro a persona
non è molto, considerando che è a buffet quindi si può mangiare quanto si vuole

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text:
pour: bien situé pour visiter le site archéologique pompéi. stationnement devant la chambre. propre. personnel courtois. prix raisonnable (102$ cad).
contre: petit déjeuner médiocre avec peu de choix (pâtisseries grasses commerciales, à peine quelques tranches de jabon, fromage commercial emballé, etc). le wifi ne fonctionne pas dans la chambre. serviettes sont minces comme des serviettes de table. mal identifié (camping |MASK| et non hôtel |MASK|: confusion).

cet hôtel est bon pour une nuit si vous visitez le site pompéi. sans plus.

reasons: petit déjeuner médiocre avec peu de choix
à peine quelques tranches de jabon

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text:
ベスヴィオ周遊鉄道の駅に近く、ポンペイ遺跡の目の前でロケーションがとても良いです。
トレニタリアのポンペイ駅の方がレストランや土産物屋が多いですが、こちらはポンペイ遺跡のメインエントランスから少し離れています。
(遺跡観光がメインであれば、ポンペイ遺跡からみて西側のホテルが良いです。)

施設は所々年季を感じますが、おそらくリノベしたのか総じて綺麗でした。シャワーの温度、水圧も許容範囲で、コスパは良いと思います。
ただ、閑散期のためか朝ごはんがクロワッサンとハム、チーズ、ヨーグルトのみだったのは少し残念。簡単なサラダなどあればなお良し。

旅の目的がポンペイ観光で、それ以外の条件にあまりこだわりがない方にはおすすめの宿です。

reasons: 朝ごはんがクロワッサンとハム、チーズ、ヨーグルトのみだった
簡単なサラダなどあればなお良し

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: nice hotel right next to the pompeii ruins. lots of eating and shopping with in walking distance.

reasons: lots of eating and shopping within walking distance

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: next to superior marine entrance to pompeii ruins!

reasons: next to superior marine entrance to pompeii ruins!

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.title: very comfortable hotel, very close to pompeii.
110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: the hotel was great, overall good experience. the staff were very helpful apart from the checking out. we had to check out early (before 8 am) for an early flight and encountered a night desk clerk/manager, who tried to charge us again for the room, was rude and very unfriendly. after what had been an excellent stay with very helpful staff, this was our departing memory of the hotel. i must stress before this, all the other staff were lovely and very accomodating.

reasons: tried to charge us again for the room

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: gutes hotel direkt am eingang zum archäologischen park. frühstück etwas mager
very clean. close enough to walk to pompeii ruins. free breakfast was good.

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.title: non è un hotel .
110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: sono camere piccole con modesto arredamento  e riscaldamento inadeguato. no ha le caratteristiche di un hotel! per la colazione bisogna uscire fuori in un locale senza riscaldamento.

reasons: bisogna uscire fuori in un locale senza riscaldamento

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: i travel the world..this property is like new inside..extremely clean, 1 minute from train, and 1 minute from main pompeii entry. the best location for sure. breakfast was great..and they will store bags while you see pompeii. 100% recommend.

reasons: they will store bags while you see pompeii

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: ottima posizione, buona pulizia e servizi. consigliato

nall'arrico la persona alla reception x nulla accogliente, nn da info se nn più volte richieste.camera con cimice dentro e pavimenti sporchi..inoltre nonostante avessi pagato x la familiare con richiesta speciale specificata di 3 ospiti con i 3 letti configurati divano matrimoniale e lettino nn trovo il 3 letto e mi si dice che nn ne avevo diritto..il supplemento è stato pagato, ma mi sento rispondere che nn vale quello scritto da expedia ma che si usa avere solo 2 letti x 3 persone.lanscelta della stanza era proprio xni 3 letti separati e ho pagato il doppio delle altre strutture..fatto presente agli altri receptionist mi hanno dato ragione..ma siamo stati costretti a prendere anche una singola e pagarla x intero senza sconti e senza rimborso del surplus della camera x il lettino che altri nn era che un puffi al max adatto ad un bimbo piccolo.x fortuna il resto del personale gentile e disponibile.la nstrafottenza ebl'ignoranza del primo receptionist ha rovinato metà della vacanza..certo che come prima esperienza con expedia nn è x nulla rassicurante.

reasons: la persona alla reception x nulla accogliente
non da info se nn più volte richieste
l'ignoranza del primo receptionist ha rovinato metà della vacanza

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: lo unico que no me gusto, es que el aire acondicionado no funcionaba y no se podia acceder a cambiar la temperatura. por lo demas muy buen lugar

reasons: no se podia acceder a cambiar la temperatura

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: close to pompeii entrance. nice rooms and quiet. friendly helpful staff.
the office is really convenient but the rooms were a bit of a trek so just be aware.  the room was really nice.
good breakfast and very helpful daytime staff. our room had bulbs missing and exposed wiring. needs a bit more care and it will be fine. wi fi must improve. night staff must be able to speak english.
nessuna criticità, personale molto disponibile
tranquilo e confortável. muito próximo a entrada porta marina das escavações arqueológicas de pompéia.
posizione molto comoda per gli scavi e per i ristoranti.
